Friend,

I'm ready to fight for you and the American people. As the 118th Congress gets underway, **I will take on President Biden and his radical democrat partners in Congress.**

I won't let them get away with hijacking your God-given rights and freedoms. I won't let them get away with spending your hard-earned money on a Socialist Agenda that's only going to cripple our nation, and I won't let them get away with poisoning our nation's future with their radical ideology.

For the last two years, the American people have suffered under a failing economy thanks to **out-of-touch liberals who only care about themselves and their Hollywood donors.**

**Not anymore. clean_body: | | = Folks, in November, voters across the country proved that they’re willing to fight for abortion rights against the anti-choice extremists who threaten them. That fight is just beginning. The next battle will take place in two days: a special election for a State Senate seat that could very well decide the future of safe abortion access in Virginia. Here’s why: Gov. Glenn Youngkin wants to enact a statewide abortion ban – and the only thing standing in his way is the narrow three-seat Democratic majority in the State Senate. But now, we have an incredibly rare opportunity to flip a red seat blue and expand our majority. My friend Aaron Rouse is running for this seat to uphold our Democratic principles and defend reproductive freedom in Richmond – but his pro-Trump opponent will help Gov. clean_body: If we fall even one dollar short, we’ll have to stop our critical work to defend our Democracy in 2024. For good. | | Peter, this could not be worse. = With just a few hours left to meet tonight’s first — and most important — goal of 2023, our Congressional Majority Fund deadline, we’re still $2,149 shy of our goal... If we fall even one dollar short, we’ll have to stop our critical work to defend our Democracy in 2024. For good. But if 250 top Pennsylvania Democrats (like you!) step up and = we’ll have the tools to launch Democratic heroes to victory next year! Look, Peter: we are running out of time. = | = Our Democratic priorities are all on the line , Peter — from voting rights, to reproductive rights, to so much more! MAGA monsters in Congress have made it clear that they’re out for blood, Peter. Getting ahead NOW is the ONLY way to protect our Democracy in 2024 — and it starts with you. In the coming days, we need to raise $3,480 to reach our first fundraising deadline of the year. | Your support and financial contribution have been essential in reaching our goals last year, but our work for 2023 is just getting started. To thank you for your support and to keep up our strong work, we are offering a start-of-the-year special: By chipping in ANY AMOUNT, you are helping us hit our FIRST goal. You are ensuring that there is no gap in our work and that we can keep fighting for freedom this year. Together, we can make a difference and secure our conservative values in 2023. body:
we need to replace her with a real Democrat

* State legislative races are historically underfunded and far too often fall under the radar – **_especially special elections._**
* And after our historic wins in 2022, state Republicans will fight tooth and nail to defend this seat. **We need to put everything we have into helping Democrats WIN.**

It’s clear: Democratic victory on Tuesday is a vital first step. State legislative races are historically underfunded and far too often fall under the radar – especially special elections. And after our historic wins in 2022, state Republicans will fight tooth and nail to defend this seat. We need to put everything we have into helping Democrats WIN. It’s clear: Democratic victory on Tuesday is a vital first step. That’s why we need every grassroots Democrat reading this email to come together now and own a piece of this fight. subject: For: Peter

body:
|
---
| | | |
---

---
| | | **_Help me hit our goal of 200 responses from your area to our OFFICIAL 2023 Priorities Survey before too late!

-Mike Pence_**
---
|
---

Hi Peter!

It's Vice President Mike Pence! I recorded a special video message for you because I have a very critical mission for you. _**[Message alert for Peter only!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62176615:62mQxvGNH:m:1:3331421248:261DE5BAE2B0B42C068DBE761ED32E64:r "Message alert for Peter only!")**_

PENCE’S VIDEO")
---
**Accept VP Pence 's mission before it's too late!**
I need to hear directly from you, Peter. Why? We have strong Conservative Patriots geared up and ready to defend our conservative majority in the House. But they need your help if they stand a chance!

**_[That's why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us SAVE AMERICA!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62176615:62mQxvGNH:m:1:3331421248:261DE5BAE2B0B42C068DBE761ED32E64:r "That’s why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us
SAVE AMERICA!")_**

**With the future of our nation in the balance, we can't leave anything to chance.**

My mission for you, Peter? Help me hit our goal of 200 responses from your area to our OFFICIAL 2023 Priorities Survey before too late!

Sincerely,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62176615:62mQxvGNH:m:1:3331421248:261DE5BAE2B0B42C068DBE761ED32E64:r "Vice President Mike Pence")
---
Vice President Mike Pence
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62176616:62mQxvGNH:m:1:3331421248:261DE5BAE2B0B42C068DBE761ED32E64:r "RedWaveFooter")
---
House Republicans have TWO words you MUST hear right now: **THANK YOU!** Because of you, House Republicans FIRED Pelosi. None of our success would be possible without you! To recognize the HUGE part you played in this MASSIVE RED WAVE, **[we'd like you to have this EXCLUSIVE piece of House Republicans merch!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62176616:62mQxvGNH:m:1:3331421248:261DE5BAE2B0B42C068DBE761ED32E64:r "we'd like you to have this EXCLUSIVE piece of House Republicans merch!")**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We’re a day away from a state senate election that could result in a total abortion ban in the Commonwealth of Virginia. The Democratic candidate, Aaron Rouse, needs your help right now to get voters to the polls.
body:
Abortion could be banned in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5db71daa-489f-46e1-9245-d02a6eff1725/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_We are only 1 day from a race that could lead to an abortion ban in the Commonwealth of Virginia_**** _._** [**_To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91223c83-2b96-467e-a53d-91feba3000ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This coming Tuesday, January 10th, is a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. Why is this so crucial: Because anti-choice fanatic _Glenn Youngkin is Governor. Republicans also control the state house. Our paper-thin, 21-19 majority in the state senate is all that stands between Virginia women and Republican promises to make women second class citizens. **There are two problems, though. ** **1) **The Manchin problem. One Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as "pro-life" and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion **2)** The open state senate seat to be filled Tuesday. If Republicans win, they'll just need Morissey to join them in voting against abortion--and it'll be banned in all cases.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31af6e35-73f9-4bdd-9aee-4e350660a17e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**If we elect **_**_abortion-rights champion, Aaron Rouse, we'll protect _all_ the rights of 8.6 million Virginians. If we allow his opponent, extremist Kevin Adams to win, abortion becomes illegal in the Old Dominion. _**_**This will lead to women sustaining grievous injuries--even death--because of doctors too scared to treat them.**_ **_Rarely does one state senate seat make the difference._ _This one does. _** [**_What we do NOW will determine if Virginia women are forced to_**** _ hand over control of their bedrooms and doctors offices to Peeping Toms in the state legislature._****_ To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e9993d5-1ff3-49d7-8ce9-d17c6f5fff35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for all women, for never giving into the tyrants who wish to control their most fundamental decision in their lives._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6e9f690-bca7-40cc-ad36-cb1a1d93c30b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/aaronrousevirginiastatesenate8-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b0d56f1-d2bb-4c36-881f-0fdaedd5d563/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: National Gun Owner
subject: When nature smacks you, it’s time to fight back…
body:
I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time...
---
| |
* * *
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11164/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/81c7e5983ec83429232220561735f9c5f653e2d6) here at any time. January 9th, 2023 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -

* * *
| | | |
Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my [Tactical Balaclava](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11164/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/81c7e5983ec83429232220561735f9c5f653e2d6) around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11164/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/81c7e5983ec83429232220561735f9c5f653e2d6) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11164/6374453/bc11d2224db6409b570d174af991a56b32d89e49/81c7e5983ec83429232220561735f9c5f653e2d6)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, go here now and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,

---

_~National Gun Owner_
* * *
| | |
* * *

name: Denisha Allen - American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | Peter,The COVID-19 pandemic gave parents a unique glimpse into their kids' daily lives at school.**_The result?_** A MASSIVE shift in public support for SCHOOL CHOICE in America.For so many families, one look at what their children we're learning over Zoom was all it took to want a change. For countless others, distance learning just didn't work._**Why? Because a one-size-fits-all approach to education is NEVER the right fit for any individual student.**_**Hi this is Denisha Merriweather Allen, Senior Fellow at the American Federation for Children. You may have seen me talking about school choice on Fox News.** You may not know the American Federation for Children yet, but as someone very involved in the school choice fight, I can guarantee that you will know who we are soon enough!No organization is making a bigger difference on the front lines of the school choice movement than the American Federation for Children.**Our organization believes in funding STUDENTS, not systems. These are the four major pillars of our mission:**
---
| |
* Advocating for change at the state and national level regarding school choice issues most important to today's parents.
* Empowering families with the freedom to choose the best K-12 education for their children.
* Connecting families to resources to make the best education decisions for their children.
* Identifying and developing tomorrow's leaders in the school choice movement.

---
| | [**JOIN OUR MOVEMENT >> ACT ON SCHOOL CHOICE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | **At the American Federation for Children, we believe that when funding for education follows students to the school of their choice, families and kids win.** We're fighting for families and students across the country who don't yet have that option.**For Tera Myers** , her family, and her special needs son, Samuel, it didn't take long to find out that public schools just didn't work for them... that "one size" certainly did not fit their family's needs.After years of lobbying, school choice legislation passed in Ohio, and the Myers family has never looked back. **Now, Tera is an advocate for choice across the country, and her son Samuel is succeeding at his own pace.**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | **[_> > Watch Tera Myers' 2020 RNC speech on school choice_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)**
---
[**PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR SCHOOL CHOICE >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | Peter, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight so parents like Tera get a choice in their child's education.**In just the past few years, we 've seen HUGE results.**
---
| |
* After COVID, school choice is now supported by 72% of Americans
* Our organization has rallied school choice activists across the country
* Over 700K students are now in school choice programs nationwide

---
| | Now, we're gearing up to take the next leap and deliver school choice wins in EVERY STATE in America.**[_But to do that, we need folks like YOU to start taking action right now by donating today!_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)**
---
| | [**Support Education Freedom Today >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | The Education Freedom Pledge gives citizens and legislators alike the opportunity to signal their support for school choice in America.**It has been signed by Americans from all walks of life, regardless of political party, creed, race, or income level.****Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Join us today >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)**

---
| | [**JOIN OUR MOVEMENT >> ACT ON SCHOOL CHOICE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | Peter, the opponents of our movement - the teachers' unions - wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.****If enough grassroots Americans support the Education Freedom Pledge and join our movement, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the school choices they deserve.[_I hope you 'll take a stand today! >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)**
---
| | [**DONATE TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---
| | Thank you,
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62178896:6kUNqvGON:m:1:3331421248:17A5D6FCDAF0983E42D0E80F58B98A7A:r)
---

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: We are back in session and ready to get to work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter,
The Tennessee General Assembly will be back in session starting tomorrow, January 10th. My team and I look forward to a productive session, working to improve the quality of life for every Tennessean.
It remains my honor to serve District 20 as State Senator in 2023. In the new year, I look forward to continuing to work for:
*
Accountability
on
no-bid
contracts
*
Responsible
stewardship
of
our
land
and
resources
*
Making
sure
that
federal
dollars
are
getting
to
our
district
*
Reliable
and
responsive
constituent
services
We have a strong and exciting package of bills, and always want to hear from you if you have legislative ideas as well.
As this new session begins, I am asking for your financial support to help my continued efforts in the Tennessee State Senate. If you are able to make a contribution, you can donate by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelltn20] We are not allowed to raise money once session begins, and we all know how competitive a race Senate District 20 could be in 2024.
Thank you for your support and consideration, and Happy New Year!
-Senator Heidi Campbell
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelltn20]
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, The Tennessee General Assembly will be back in session starting tomorrow, January 10th. My team and I look forward to a productive session, working to improve the quality of life for every Tennessean. It remains my honor to serve District 20 as State Senator in 2023. In the new year, I look forward to continuing to work for: Accountability on no-bid contracts Responsible stewardship of our land and resources Making sure that federal dollars are getting to our district Reliable and responsive constituent services We have a strong and exciting package of bills, and always want to hear from you if you have legislative ideas as well. As this new session begins, I am asking for your financial support to help my continued efforts in the Tennessee State Senate. If you are able to make a contribution, you can donate by clicking here. [] We are not allowed to raise money once session begins, and we all know how competitive a race Senate District 20 could be in 2024. Thank you for your support and consideration, and Happy New Year! -Senator Heidi Campbell Donate [] [] [] [] Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer. Campbell for State Senate PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d67d585e3e4b4039965c5ae9b50753c0&_e=vrt6Sb4McAxdArYfH9E23kiJCIv6HkWg4BmQ8ccfQdloAsFZpoCFZJgi7RwwT6p-mSyl8uBmyAOw0a1kaRyqjPqv3NQO8l4N4WFtns1X-1BvQwvYpEce1ZWDY08-SJr7z6alm0DFRSmr3r1iFgx9SKz4CAMQtBDN4TQVdza7OdHY__zhHTyC5fc7k6aFSXTj-qp3jox4NUNoy_vbP9nuaUklOQ8xzmVQ2ATxHvm6pr7v1X9EZTeyG2OZuvtMj3So8JDsxlBoAtYrreNdWizieEV_9shg54EwDOHQvwJo7c4%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d67d585e3e4b4039965c5ae9b50753c0&_e=vrt6Sb4McAxdArYfH9E23kiJCIv6HkWg4BmQ8ccfQdloAsFZpoCFZJgi7RwwT6p-mSyl8uBmyAOw0a1kaRyqjPqv3NQO8l4N4WFtns1X-1BvQwvYpEce1ZWDY08-SJr7z6alm0DFRSmr3r1iFgx9SD6UCd8fmc1dJMjD7dhlRyI6OLwjd_4dwmbNkfADCBM8r9DLqnK3GkWU5s3D2V74XTGUc8N8ml0IoEFb8hSbqGPLOyU5b1MErqFBf9M7ERlKXOQrYfuqwFkGQEFfCaBJzGsnkIyPXOLIjXwuHytlEEc%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d67d585e3e4b4039965c5ae9b50753c0&_e=vrt6Sb4McAxdArYfH9E23kiJCIv6HkWg4BmQ8ccfQdloAsFZpoCFZJgi7RwwT6p-mSyl8uBmyAOw0a1kaRyqjPqv3NQO8l4N4WFtns1X-1BvQwvYpEce1ZWDY08-SJr7z6alm0DFRSmr3r1iFgx9SO_U0-DcGq0P_FM7wFpdItMQ3Yt-_M3xKAM4CKFUazXe47nkSUMNzY-DMebQMPM6xu152xiOftMq9uMZdeMOPumn1WKUhdILB56ESB8lpMhr8pOBFdCQKHLdwlDjWYvbaX_hopJJMikXhzy99YR0spE%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d67d585e3e4b4039965c5ae9b50753c0&_e=vrt6Sb4McAxdArYfH9E23kiJCIv6HkWg4BmQ8ccfQdloAsFZpoCFZJgi7RwwT6p-mSyl8uBmyAOw0a1kaRyqjPqv3NQO8l4N4WFtns1X-1BvQwvYpEce1ZWDY08-SJr7E3lKDJLuw3Apr0sGfgK8Muk-Mb-Osr-5_54WuUAYNHMAQ4EMPHSPwi6QGRNsGZx5Zru9x52-fdT7KzbDueXOTIgXhc3yBwSr1zT6JamRRTAfH1iab5F5KIxhm9v1uHshVxA-IBPnJXen9F1M0dVU_vqloPWuPRPOWKgVa9C9zAQ%3D)

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. body:

---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory--and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs9oknnvsa6pvi2t4qb87tbooroa0u85708fnpk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9gecor2chh2bs)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmhhsmb1vmdjm3igdpoe61r4ied16a67k4amuf40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9gecor2chh2bs)

---
| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America--and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvh1goqp5np31ajfgu92p57u8an8tt0udvhhvke8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9gecor2chh2bs)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfr1oa0j5g0pjomeso2a1mruqbeftdgbc0lla5u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geaob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfu3k0mbfggtb5h30n6j1age4h1ru3mt47bkif7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geaob4cph2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze60nbae00q2v74tfrtv7ff7inqee9l6f1tmer0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geaob4cph2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3lru9pjnqdg5ndsr5d73t9sjffmt96ufbrm21tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geaob4cph2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zggvg3a4hj50tovb2783cbf6j9jl5t04k6n21f5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geaob4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

| Dear Friend,
We have much work to do to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family in peace. Thank God Virginia has a Republican Governor, but, radical leftists in the Virginia State Senate continue to block or water down just about everything Governor Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, myself and other fellow Republicans are trying to undo or fix. We must win back Republican control of the Senate.
I am asking you to put your faith in me, someone who works hard, has never voted Democrat, has never run as a Democrat, has won all three of my state level General Elections, and someone who has one of the most Conservative voting records in Virginia.
Starting tomorrow 11:59pm,Tuesday January 10 there are 45 days where my opponents can continue to fundraise while I am defending our conservative values in Richmond. This January 10, 11:59pm fundraising deadline is very important because I cannot raise money for my campaign while in session January 11 to February 25.
We have just 36 hours before the end of the fundraising cycle.
To continue fighting for you, we must raise enough money to win.
[Please donate today so that I can fully fund my campaign!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X1wgvHztJXyIbUlpaN78zOdd1zod4BQ1cHfJfwwyfkVrG8PBkWSGlhCszGhA3BYnkONO0kUBh2GtIRE0kd4vYrDAIAjGI45_3OD4OnCvHTP-rJd1ZWLNCxuUpVzO1_IFECGVg9atznAC98J5Y5bYa-gJtiIdH71dCASIQMaW_-Q6z4Ak37_diPNXXxTwV83DxfgzJSLO0_zgk-yIOmZOgM-a3N23u_H8&c=g93c7flEaoydIU7N80Zy9Y4OAd-5a8yAGXyU4S_-5XIjxPZZJwDcEg==&ch=mhIZgY_6Stxa8RX7roKtr-eBdCfO9adjZzs7emCAhvkFoW5I1jPw1A==)
[Donate Any Amount Today! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X1wgvHztJXyIbUlpaN78zOdd1zod4BQ1cHfJfwwyfkVrG8PBkWSGli_XcB7ffRZe_Wnbk-ll4mb_5Gl7QujmYI5SW5odKDEiHeahbqVNXQTWDi3mkAZTyuGCKb1uLa5Cy_6_XEIcS8OIIB5yEOp5tFZOKQJ0q5LmMSL6Dg6XkRNXozK3fv9J7VyRke5R5qLVJ0dMCK-7r3g=&c=g93c7flEaoydIU7N80Zy9Y4OAd-5a8yAGXyU4S_-5XIjxPZZJwDcEg==&ch=mhIZgY_6Stxa8RX7roKtr-eBdCfO9adjZzs7emCAhvkFoW5I1jPw1A==)

Starting tomorrow 11:59pm,Tuesday January 10 there are 45 days where my opponents can continue to fundraise while I am defending our conservative values in Richmond. This January 10, 11:59pm fundraising deadline is very important because I cannot raise money for my campaign while in session January 11 to February 25. We have just 36 hours before the end of the fundraising cycle. To continue fighting for you, we must raise enough money to win. == == == | == | If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP. | Respectfully, Delegate John McGuire Running for == Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | == | == | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: RE: The terms of the House Deal secured by 20 conservatives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want you to hear it directly from me.

I want you to hear it directly from me.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zshdgtd5sa7splpc222jjlkoatjtg1317g6cllp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge6pj4chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Our razor-thin House majority is America’s last line of defense against Biden’s radical agenda.
---
That’s why 20 Republicans – including myself – banded together and fought until we secured a deal that _ensures_ our new majority is fighting for _YOU_.
---
Here are the terms of the deal we secured:
---
_
1. Allowing a single member to make the motion to remove the Speaker if he goes back on his word or policy agenda

2. A “Church” style committee, as recommended by Tucker Carlson: this allows us to look into the weaponization of organizations like the FBI against the American people

3. A vote on term limits

4. Single-subject bills that can’t be loaded with irrelevant nonsense

5. A Texas border plan

6. A budget that stops an increase in the debt ceiling and holds the Democrat-controlled Senate accountable

7. Ending ALL COVID mandates and funding

8. Requiring a minimum of 72 hours to read a bill
_

---
[**Please make a contribution to support House conservatives in our fight against the destructive Biden-Harris agenda.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrp9rbijmeho355r8ojtc9vncipb544eaivrvio_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge6pj4chh2bs)

---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu1q0kna7mne1s5vvj8gl8s1tp1iecsg3fkkjr68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge6pj4chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmnra7v5i9l6hebidprak0j3ushf4s59tp2n8g38_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge6pj4chh2bs)
---
_After our deal was struck, Tucker Carlson praised the new committee that will investigate the FBI’s corruption – which will be formed by Rep. Thomas Massie, Rep. Jim Jordan, and Rep. Dan Bishop._
---
Friend, it was critical that we negotiated a deal that will put our House majority in its strongest position against the Biden-Harris Administration.
---
With Democrats wreaking havoc on our border, our economy, and our constitutional rights, we have a responsibility to use our slim majority in the House to hold the line and fight for the American people.
---
But we cannot win this fight all on our own.
---
**We need the full backing of the American people to ensure that we have the support to hold the line and FIGHT for YOUR priorities.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support House conservatives in our fight against the destructive Biden-Harris agenda.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6a7clbaatv7raim1h59mrko3u63a1kl2qb01p7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge6pj4chh2bs)
---
Thank you,

body:
Help us give a warm welcome to Ohio's new Democratic U.S. Representatives, Emilia Sykes and Greg Landsman!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57095502/386883868/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmUyMzk2YS00NzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ79bhqsawtq4KPIpMEn1BJgCONJHrBxQUokILcq3u0=) | Hey team,

The 118th U.S. Congress has _FINALLY_ kicked off. After 15 rounds of voting for Speaker of the House, Emilia Sykes and Greg Landsman took their oaths of office and were officially sworn in.

**Emilia Sykes** won Ohio's open 13th district, one of D.C. Republicans' top targets. Emilia has spent her whole career delivering for northeast Ohio, and we know she’ll continue to do so in Congress.

**Greg Landsman** took down MAGA Republican Steve Chabot in Ohio's 1st district, flipping a critical jurisdiction. Now, southwest Ohio will have a champion for working families in Congress.

Emilia and Greg's wins helped Democrats beat the odds and outperform expectations in the midterms. Will you join us in sending our best wishes and congratulations to the newest members of Ohio’s delegation?

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj0qluvripaavcupdhb9ea0sobfetr59mjctl000_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geeoj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze1ssvr1o42escek3imtih1ti25hgeqggj4arrqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geeoj4c9h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbj2iogc6pjno6c772muc8dp6cq4e1ia713fn420_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geeoj4c9h2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd1evlvrkq2b5mjhd84vp68otc26tsfmu0hk00fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geeoj4c9h2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9jhuve52qmp3uvthj0g7hjee9v0dhf4m2t0rou0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9geeoj4c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: The terms of the House Deal secured by 20 conservatives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want you to hear it directly from me. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7792%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DEupz3UHNA79sS8h5c2vGg&sysid=1)

I want you to hear it directly from me.
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91636%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5QkAtsRFm4k%2foD%2bD0CDCOw&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
Our razor-thin House majority is America’s last line of defense against Biden’s radical agenda.
---
That’s why 20 Republicans - including myself - banded together and fought until we secured a deal that _ensures_ our new majority is fighting for _YOU_.
---
Here are the terms of the deal we secured:
---
_
1. Allowing a single member to make the motion to remove the Speaker if he goes back on his word or policy agenda

2. A “Church” style committee, as recommended by Tucker Carlson: this allows us to look into the weaponization of organizations like the FBI against the American people

3. A vote on term limits

4. Single-subject bills that can’t be loaded with irrelevant nonsense

5. A Texas border plan

6. A budget that stops an increase in the debt ceiling and holds the Democrat-controlled Senate accountable

7. Ending ALL COVID mandates and funding

8. Requiring a minimum of 72 hours to read a bill
_

---
[**Please make a contribution to support House conservatives in our fight against the destructive Biden-Harris agenda.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91637%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mmfXzQgFArZYd4yuurVTVg&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91632%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Lp0U4ZjAXSJ9nybM%2b%2fdug&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91633%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jNXDhxVRFIoQfm%2f5xvi2hw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91636%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5QkAtsRFm4k%2foD%2bD0CDCOw&sysid=1)
---
_After our deal was struck, Tucker Carlson praised the new committee that will investigate the FBI’s corruption - which will be formed by Rep. Thomas Massie, Rep. Jim Jordan, and Rep. Dan Bishop. _
---
Friend, it was critical that we negotiated a deal that will put our House majority in its strongest position against the Biden-Harris Administration.
---
With Democrats wreaking havoc on our border, our economy, and our constitutional rights, we have a responsibility to use our slim majority in the House to hold the line and fight for the American people.
---
But we cannot win this fight all on our own.
---
**We need the full backing of the American people to ensure that we have the support to hold the line and FIGHT for YOUR priorities.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support House conservatives in our fight against the destructive Biden-Harris agenda.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91634%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mHQA%2bYcocdPlThsDOJp65g&sysid=1)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I was sworn in:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57096639/386887685/-1035439352?amount=10&refcode=BWC_EM_FR_3MO_20230109_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBhMzE3Ny00YTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJeBHPCvyDfQAXssgxHMPlt_eN35XbodP96pN6ow2dc=) [I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day — 1,000 gifts in my first 72 hours — to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Bonnie? name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: What Issues Should TVP Focus on in the 2023 Memphis City Elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
January 9, 2022
Dear friend,
We’re less than a year away from a crucial election: the races the City of Memphis Mayor and Council. Memphis is one of the largest and most diverse cities in Tennessee. It’s also a progressive haven in the midst of one of the most conservative states in America.
We need a City Mayor and Council that reflects the values of Memphians and who can usher in progress, innovation, and opportunity.
Tennessee Voter Project will be on the frontlines of this race, along with important municipal races across our state. We’re gonna do all we can to push the conversation where Memphians want to go.
Here are some of the issues we’ll be demanding answers on from Mayoral & City Council Candidates:
*
Plan
to
provide
funding
for
Memphis
Shelby
County
Schools
*
Increased
investment
in
public
transit
*
Boosting
our
public
libraries
What are the issues you want TVP to focus on in the City of Memphis Mayoral & Council elections?
TAKE THE MEMPHIS CITY ELECTION ISSUES SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bxO5hRDFCkWxM1zaldO5lQ2]
We’ve got big plans for the next year and we need your help to make it happen. We hope you’ll consider supporting TVP by making a contribution today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] .
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2uq9pnuc7g78d7uh23n7lde9222l3t6m6ska9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge9o32c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06s2ubtshu9kvhtiradqsa6d7vbvkvu3iovd8mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge9o32c1h2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkn2i3bghuuivj9ue27v6jq6bnei8up90d6d92sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge9o32c1h2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg37plr45gsaihhk6a5m27c2tcr7fc1i6hoof1qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge9o32c1h2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpt68ga49i7qlmihrdbhgb96iiqkogs2ggkbm3g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ge9o32c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

Derek, Until this week, the most noteworthy thing Travis Hackworth has done since joining the Virginia Senate in 2021 is proposing a bill that would have weakened the rights and protections of transgender and nonbinary students in Virginia (which Democrats thankfully voted down in the Senate). At an event this past weekend, **Senator Hackworth said his priority in this session is passing a “life at conception” bill.** _”We will be doing a life at conception bill. That’s a big bill that we will be carrying”._ **\- Sen. Hey,

I wanted you to be the first to know:

**I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court.
**
**[Rush a donation so we can keep pushing this case! They want us to stop but we must prove them WRONG.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2hionic6fkstif7n1dldce9k4vcrlt2d0qn7vk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie0o76cth2bs)
**
The complete and utter CHAOS that was the Arizona governor election needs to be EXAMINED BY THE SUPREME COURT!

**I will not concede. Why? Because Katie Hobbs was not duly elected.
**
I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard

**_[Stop Katie Hobbs.

Kari Lake

💥I have 3 POWER-PACKED shows this week!!💥 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/famed-epstein-survivor-maria-farmer-w-me-this-week?e=5fa0631807)

| | The Rachel Hamm Show has a week is full of interesting conversations with three remarkable people! You won't want to miss these shows!

**Monday January 9th @ 10AM PST we'll be LIVE with the amazing Doug Billings.** Billings will share his personal story of making a mid-life career change while raising his son Michael who has Down Syndrome. Doug is a single dad who has faced adversity and overcome it, all while fighting for our country. Billings has a goal to "rebuild our country into the great Republic God intended it to be." This LIVE interview will be held on Rumble & YouTube and then the recording will be posted on Spotify afterwards.

**Tuesday, January 10th at 10 AM PST, my guest will be Tammy Hotsenpiller.** Tammy and I will be discussing "The Pursuit of Miracles". Hotsenpiller is a published author of eight books! Most recently she wrote the book, "Fasting for Miracles". She has the passion for equipping others to embrace their natural abilities, personal passion and spiritual gifts. Interested in experiencing a miracle? Tune in Tuesday for info about that!

**Friday, January 13th at 10 AM PST I'll be talking FACE-TO-FACE with the brave Jeffrey Epstein survivor, Maria Farmer!** Maria is the _only_ Epstein survivor to ever officially report him to the NYPD and to the FBI. She reported Epstein in 1996 and the authorities just sat on the detailed information she gave them! Maria was the very talented artist featured in the Netflix Documentary: "Jeffrey Epstein: Filthy Rich". Maria wants you to know what it was like for her after reporting Jeffrey and who she thinks the real puppet master of his whole operation was. _Hint: It's not Ghislaine Maxwell and the real answer will shock you!_ Tune in Friday to hear who it is!

**_COMING UP NEXT WEEK:_**
Are you interested in hearing secrets about the elites of this country? Tune in on Tuesday, January 17th at 10 AM PST to hear the shocking information George Tonks has to share. George was a very handsome child model who was trafficked into an underworld of elites that will blow your mind! He then was framed by those same elites when he made moves that made them vulnerable. His life has been forever marked by people who are still alive and well and running around on their private jets. _Hint: One of the people he will tell us about is living in the White House NOW!_
You won't want to miss my conversation with George Tonks on Tuesday, January 17th at 10AM PST!

body:
With the future of our nation in the balance, we can't leave anything to chance.

|

| | | **_Help me hit our goal of 200 responses from your area to our OFFICIAL 2023 Priorities Survey before it's too late!

-Mike Pence_**

|
---

Hi Friend!

It's Vice President Mike Pence! I recorded a special video message for you because I have a very critical mission for you. _**[Message alert for Friend only!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsas0n940hour5k2r5nq5h1p3lv27l1kqmaee900_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie8pj7cjh2bs "Message alert for Friend only!")**_

---
**Accept VP Pence 's mission before it's too late!**
I need to hear directly from you, Friend. Why? We have strong Conservative Patriots geared up and ready to defend our conservative majority in the House. But they need your help if they stand a chance!

**_[That's why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us SAVE AMERICA!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg0pi1s8um0c4lloegocfirpt3l0ui7997nr0ti0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie8pj7cjh2bs "That’s why we need you to fill out this urgent survey by 11:59 PM tonight and help us SAVE AMERICA!")_**

**With the future of our nation in the balance, we can't leave anything to chance.**

My mission for you, Friend? Help me hit our goal of 200 responses from your area to our OFFICIAL 2023 Priorities Survey before it's too late!

Sincerely,

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Jan. 9th: Republicans must pass the rules package today!
body:
| | |
---
The courageous 21 conservative Republicans stood their ground in the House Speaker election and gained major wins for the American people – if the Republican majority will vote for the rules package that includes these very good changes later today. For instance, this rules package will create a committee, headed by Jim Jordan, that will finally investigate the documented abuses by our federal agencies, like the DOJ, committed against Americans. There are already moderate Republicans complaining about the rules package, so **it is critically important that every Republican hears a message from their constituents about voting FOR the rules package today.** If you have Democrat representative, please complete the other two action items listed below. We also want to thank the 21 Republicans who risked so much for their courage, and if you haven’t yet filled out our survey for 2023-2024, please fill it out, so that we can include your feedback in the organization’s plans.
---
|
---
| |
---
If you have a Republican representative, please call their office as soon as possible and **urge him or her to vote FOR the rules package under consideration today**. The votes leading up to the main vote, and the main vote itself, will happen early evening (eastern time) today. The earlier we call, the more pressure we can build to pass it. If you have time to call the D.C. office _and_ one or more of the district offices, that is even better. Otherwise, just call the D.C. office.
---
[FIND MY REP'S NUMBER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | A Portland, Oregon homeless woman named Wendy was brutally honest about how Democrat city officials’ policies are enabling ever more homelessness. “It’s a piece of cake, really,” [she said](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-AhnmVYWtbpn1PtLsEag). “That’s probably why you’ve got so many out here because they feed you three meals a day. You don’t have to do sh*t but stay in your tent or party or if you smoke a lot of dope you can do that.” Possession of personal-use amounts of heroin, methamphetamine, LSD, oxycodone, and other drugs have been legal in Oregon since 2002. Homelessness in Portland’s surrounding Multnomah County has [increased 30%](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7QHXxHzx9OUw) just since 2019. Part of the problem, according Wendy is that city officials “are loving us to death.” And in Democrat-controlled cites, the crisis is becoming increasingly violent. Just after Christmas, a homeless person shoved a three-year-old child from a railroad platform onto the tracks below. Fortunately, the child is recovering. But in greater [Los Angeles](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) this past October, a homeless man stabbed four people, killing one of them. In an unrelated incident that same month, a homeless man stabbed a woman in the head with a pair of gardening shears.
---
| | |
---
---
As you have time this week, please call and/or tweet your thanks to the 21 courageous Republicans who made it possible for the people’s House to actually represent the people again. If it works with your schedule to be able to contact them all today, great! If not, split the list up over the week, and contact as many as you can! When you call/tweet, just let them know how grateful you are for their efforts and bravery.

| | Is it better to live in a red state or a blue state? Americans have voted with their feet and [the decision is clear](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._p6Y_DZZcIELQ). Both the blue states of California and New York experienced a “six-figure” population decrease since 2020, according to data from the U.S. Census Bureau. Eighteen states overall saw a population decrease last year, with blue states standing as the biggest losers numerically, according to the Census Bureau report. In contrast, the red state of Texas experienced the nation’s largest population growth. The Lone Star State’s gain was fueled by net domestic migration (230,961), net international migration (118,614), and natural increase (118,159). Red-leaning Florida had the second-largest population growth, with an increase of 416,754 residents. Net migration was the largest contributing component of change to Florida’s growth, adding 444,484 residents.

| | As crime explodes in Democrat-run cities, the Left’s "solution" is to coddle criminals. It’s no secret that crime climbed at an alarming rate in cities under Democrat officials’ rule. In Democrat-run Milwaukee, for example, homicides in 2022 were [more than double](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._w) what they were in 2019. Astonishingly, amid all the violence, [leftwing Democrats are concluding](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that their priority should be neither to protect citizens nor to assist victims but to lavish criminals with love. In the State of Washington, Rep. Tarra Simmons has already pre-filed a bill that would ensure [inmates are paid minimum wage](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/5mPrWQ16Eb0XFzKUZFsf-Q) for their prison work. In Illinois, lawmakers approved a new law that will effectively end cash bail (which remains in legal limbo for now). In Michigan a new law will allow convicted felons to have parts of their record automatically [expunged](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-OnRleHQ9QXByaWwlMjBPZiUyMDIwMjMlMjBNb3ZpbmclMjBGb3J3YXJkJnRleHQ9VXAlMjB0byUyMDIlMjBmZWxvbnklMjBjb252aWN0aW9ucyxleHB1bmdlZCUyMDclMjB5ZWFycyUyMGFmdGVyJTIwc2VudGVuY2luZyJ9/go9LzygkR-tbzrqqXgex-Q) after their release from prison. Not to be outdone, liberal [California](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) will automatically seal nearly all criminal records four years after offenders complete their sentences.

clean_body: | | | The courageous 21 conservative Republicans stood their ground in the House Speaker election and gained major wins for the American people – if the Republican majority will vote for the rules package that includes these very good changes later today. For instance, this rules package will create a committee, headed by Jim Jordan, that will finally investigate the documented abuses by our federal agencies, like the DOJ, committed against Americans. There are already moderate Republicans complaining about the rules package, so it is critically important that every Republican hears a message from their constituents about voting FOR the rules package today. If you have Democrat representative, please complete the other two action items listed below. We also want to thank the 21 Republicans who risked so much for their courage, and if you haven’t yet filled out our survey for 2023-2024, please fill it out, so that we can include your feedback in the organization’s plans. | | | If you have a Republican representative, please call their office as soon as possible and urge him or her to vote FOR the rules package under consideration today. The votes leading up to the main vote, and the main vote itself, will happen early evening (eastern time) today. The earlier we call, the more pressure we can build to pass it. If you have time to call the D.C. office and one or more of the district offices, that is even better. Otherwise, just call the D.C. office. | | | A Portland, Oregon homeless woman named Wendy was brutally honest about how Democrat city officials’ policies are enabling ever more homelessness. “It’s a piece of cake, really,” . “That’s probably why you’ve got so many out here because they feed you three meals a day. You don’t have to do sht but stay in your tent or party or if you smoke a lot of dope you can do that.” Possession of personal-use amounts of heroin, methamphetamine, LSD, oxycodone, and other drugs have been legal in Oregon since 2002. Homelessness in Portland’s surrounding Multnomah County has just since 2019. Part of the problem, according Wendy is that city officials “are loving us to death.” And in Democrat-controlled cites, the crisis is becoming increasingly violent. Just after Christmas, a homeless person shoved a three-year-old child from a railroad platform onto the tracks below. Fortunately, the child is recovering. But in greater this past October, a homeless man stabbed four people, killing one of them. In an unrelated incident that same month, a homeless man stabbed a woman in the head with a pair of gardening shears. | | | As you have time this week, please call and/or tweet your thanks to the 21 courageous Republicans who made it possible for the people’s House to actually represent the people again. If it works with your schedule to be able to contact them all today, great! If not, split the list up over the week, and contact as many as you can! Americans have voted with their feet and . Both the blue states of California and New York experienced a “six-figure” population decrease since 2020, according to data from the U.S. Census Bureau. Eighteen states overall saw a population decrease last year, with blue states standing as the biggest losers numerically, according to the Census Bureau report. In contrast, the red state of Texas experienced the nation’s largest population growth. The Lone Star State’s gain was fueled by net domestic migration (230,961), net international migration (118,614), and natural increase (118,159). Red-leaning Florida had the second-largest population growth, with an increase of 416,754 residents. Net migration was the largest contributing component of change to Florida’s growth, adding 444,484 residents. | | | We really need your input in order to plan appropriately for 2023-2024. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Asking for help is not cowardice — it’s courage.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
One of the bravest things someone can do is ask for help.
#

Peter -
One of the bravest things someone can do is ask for help.
It’s not a sign of cowardice, it’s a sign of courage. It’s not a weakness — it’s a superpower.
I grew up poor and needed help just to get three square meals a day, so I took advantage of school lunch programs.
There was no way I could afford college on my own. I needed help, and took advantage of Pell Grants.
Coming home from war in Iraq was not easy. I knew PTSD was waiting for me in the future. I needed help and got it. Therapy. And it made a huge difference.
When I look at some of the hardest times in my life, making it through requires asking for, and receiving, help.
Now I am in the midst of one of the most important decisions of my life, and I know I cannot do it without your help.
No one person can run against Senator Sinema and a Republican nominee by themselves. Not even a United States Marine. And I get closer and closer to my decision, I really need to know you are with me. Because if you are, I think we’re going to do this. And I think we’re going to win. So please:
[**I am asking for help. Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to my campaign. If I run against Senator Sinema, that’s a donation we can use on day one.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-jan23.jskq5v&refcode=em230109-1-7&t=1&akid=245%2E734936%2EHNrbZN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

subject: Tell the House VOTE NO on McCarthy's dangerous "Rules Package" (Urgent: Vote is tonight!)
body:
| | | | |

| | | In order to win enough votes for Speaker, Kevin McCarthy made a whole host of concessions to right-wing extremists, agreeing to change House rules to essentially hand over control to the lunatic fringe of the party. **But the battle isn't over yet. The House must vote on these changes — and two "moderate" Republicans have already indicated they may vote against it, and others are considering doing the same. If we can get just 3 more, we can win this.** **[Add your name now, let our Representatives know America is watching, and tell them to vote NO.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5d22d26-39f8-43e6-bad1-e21226d621ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** You can read more about the changes [here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa856fd5-4c38-4027-a415-96ddf0b33ca6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but suffice to say, they would make it virtually impossible to pass critical legislation, and would guarantee a default when the debt ceiling is reached. **Don't let them hand the steering wheel over to the biggest idiots in Congress.[Add your name now, let our Representatives know America is watching, and tell them to vote NO.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72c8ad91-1dbe-4b25-a728-a718bd8ac823/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: this is OUR year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
We can’t miss this opportunity to finally get this done... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7794%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=9%2f%2bMjFyfXSV20GmTSciTDw&sysid=1)

---
Friend, 2023 must be the year to get election integrity work done in Congress. As Co-Chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, it will be **my number issue #1 this year,** but it also needs to be the _main focus_ for the rest of Congress. We need _free_ , _fair_ , _accurate_ , and _transparent_ elections to maintain the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. **NO ONE** is fighting harder than me every day to protect our elections. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll energize my fight in the New Year by [**making a first donation of 2023 >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91757%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n38qh8PcN%2fM%2fSumE9vVM8A&sysid=1)

---
Friend, we need to ensure that we are doing everything in our power to fix Democrats’ election-related messes. **[Help me lead Congress in the fight for election integrity this year by donating today >>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91759%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I4jm6YYxJaz9i%2f9m%2bLATOQ&sysid=1)** Thank you,

We've never seen a class like this, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – After a whirlwind of drama surrounding the Speakership, the 118th Congress was finally sworn in late last week. We already know the next two years will be chaotic and that Republicans' priorities will be so vastly separated from reality — that's why the work to win back our majority _must_ start now. _A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Katie Porter is seriously considering running for an open Senate seat in California in 2024. It is Washington's worst kept secret that Senator Dianne Feinstein, who would be 91 at the time of the election, is going to retire. Katie Porter would be a fantastic Senator from California, and a great champion for progressives across the country.
body:
Upgrade this Senate seat!

| | | | | Peter, **EXCITING NEWS: **_Katie Porter is seriously considering running for an open Senate seat in California in 2024. It is Washington's worst kept secret that Senator Dianne Feinstein, who would be 91 at the time of the election, is going to retire._ **_Feinstein's done some terrific things as a trailblazer, but as the Democratic Party and country moved in a progressive direction, Feinstein's sometimes been left behind as one of the more conservative members of the Democratic caucus. This can be especially frustrating as California's become a key part of the Democratic base. _** **_Porter, meanwhile, is a progressive firebrand who knows how to message with the best of them--in fact her whiteboards taking apart corporate profiteers on the House floor has become the stuff of legend. As Politico just said about Porter:_** _Her reputation as a progressive Democrat who can speak to swing voters is also likely to help Porter. _ [**_Can you join us in sending--right away!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this outstanding progressive woman and a future leader of our party, Rep. Katie Porter_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T141e1ed2-0030-4ea1-8e51-bf35f12c0802/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te770d821-e41b-4bd4-ba22-fb41a92eed4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: number #1 issue this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
We can’t miss this opportunity to finally get this done... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0329%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HfDntlOD0esDlpfPmKJG2g&sysid=1)

---
Friend, 2023 must be the year to get election integrity work done in Congress. As Co-Chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, it will be **my number issue #1 this year,** but it also needs to be the _main focus_ for the rest of Congress. We need _free_ , _fair_ , _accurate_ , and _transparent_ elections to maintain the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. **NO ONE** is fighting harder than me every day to protect our elections. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll energize my fight in the New Year by [**making a first donation of 2023 >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655127%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bSs%2blu6t7%2flsCDqvasHxIg&sysid=1)
