name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjdpfdmrbj9r8bq10vnsjkfffgdhamft1l5hv160_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6pj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z70vqgsiemilsjpn4nd7i8jc16bbsrjd2gnq5hd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6pj2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb8k366148v9clai6b9ocg6cbpmljkmfc0hv66ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6pj2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Powerful Teachers Union Funded Illinois Republican Leadership
body:
GOP Leaders McCombie, Rezin among those who took $1.5M from Teachers Union that pushed mandates, drafted sex ed standards, in latest revelations.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/bcf94b484a44/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-funded-illinois-republican-leadership?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Breaking: Powerful Teachers Union that Supported Mandates, Helped Write Sex Education Standards, Donated to Illinois Republicans (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-that-supported-mandates-helped-write-sex-education-standards-donated-to-illinois-republicans.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The National Education Association – an organization whose state association in Illinois endorsed (https://ieanea.org/2022/09/19/iea-board-of-directors-recommends-candidates-for-statewide-constitutional-officers/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker for governor and Democrat Kwame Raoul for attorney general; promoted mandates during the pandemic, and helped write the controversial sex education standards, has donated more than $1.5 million to Illinois House and Senate Republicans since the start of the pandemic through their political action committee, Illinois PAC for Education (IPACE).

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-powerful-teachers-union-that-supported-mandates-helped-write-sex-education-standards-donated-to-illinois-republicans.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Jackson Hulke (left) and Milagros Larios Tulujan look at each other through a plastic divider at their table in Mrs. Powell's kindergarten class at South Elementary in St. Peter, Minn. Schools across Minnesota opened classrooms back up to students for in-person learning on Tuesday, Jan. 19, 2021. Principal Doreen Oelke said that students and teachers have had many different emotions returning to school, from being scared and nervous to being happy and excited (Jackson Forderer for MPR News).

At the start of the 2021 school year, Gov. Pritzker announced a mask mandate for students and teachers – and the Illinois Education Association (IEA), the largest education organization in the state, applauded the decision, with ** IEA president Kathi Griffin (https://www.northernpublicradio.org/2021-08-05/illinois-education-association-reacts-to-pritzker-school-mask-mandate?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
saying,

“We want to be back in school with our students. We so missed working with them in person. And by having a mask mandate, we have a more likely chance of staying open and working through this pandemic.”

Griffin also supported
** vaccinating (https://www.riverbender.com/articles/details/statement-from-iea-president-kathi-griffin-on-deadline-extension-of-governors-executive-order-on-vaccination-or-weekly-testing-52903.cfm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinois school children, arguing that they keep everyone safe and healthy.

“We support public health strategies that work. Vaccines are the most effective way to ensure safety. And, vaccines combined with other known effective mitigation strategies, such as wearing masks, washing hands, keeping socially distanced, appropriate building ventilation, and a vibrant testing program for students and staff will help all of us meet the goal of keeping doors open and everyone safe and healthy.”

The
** NEA (https://www.nea.org/advocating-for-change/new-from-nea/sex-education-schools-needs-upgrade?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
also played a critical role in drafting the incredibly controversial ** National Sexuality Education Standards (https://advocatesforyouth.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/josh-fose-standards-web.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, allowing teachers to teach children about gender identity, sexual orientation, hormone blockers and gender expression.

The curriculum has angered parents in Illinois and across the country – and that anger is justified. More than
** 500 school districts (https://freebeacon.com/campus/illinois-public-schools-opt-out-of-left-wing-sex-ed-standards/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in Illinois have exercised their ability to “opt-out,” declining to teach these outrageous sex education standards to children in their classrooms.

Incoming House Republican Minority Leader Rep. Tony McCombie was one of the largest recipients of IPACE money, receiving
** $119,900 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=ph1j32c0AlKA4iYdvKeJoTM3nPEA0f47I1CCT%2fR2FQNNplLq7whr0mN6ucvRtdSb&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
since 2020.
** (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=ph1j32c0AlKA4iYdvKeJoTM3nPEA0f47I1CCT%2fR2FQNNplLq7whr0mN6ucvRtdSb&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Political Donations from the Teacher’s Union to incoming Republican House Minority Leader Tony McCombie. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website).

House Republican Conference Chair Rep. David Welter received ** $60,400 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=8mJNcxn2JPS9PcPvax9R%2fbElNnj4TF%2bZhGwL1KebkIsgbxoUeJbYftVRziZ%2fbcmtbdC6ehbmPYc%3d&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

On the Senate side, Deputy Senate Republican Leader Sen. Sue Rezin received
** $55,400 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=8mJNcxn2JPS9PcPvax9R%2fYraz4KGhCaxb82%2ff%2flcjp4KmzaYEmc0wnkYczzk9RH7&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Since the start of the pandemic, ** IPACE (https://www.thecentersquare.com/illinois/teacher-unions-help-shape-pandemic-policies-in-illinois/article_b37945ea-8a89-11ec-9802-572398d638a3.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
has given $333,800 to House Speaker Chris Welch. Sen. Don Harmon, the Democratic Senate President has received $231,439.51.

In
** July (https://www.mystateline.com/news/local-news/illinois-gov-pritzker-praises-teachers/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, during the National Education Association’s national conference in Chicago, Gov. Pritzker was a keynote speaker, just two days before Vice President Kamala Harris was scheduled to address the group.

In Illinois, it’s expected that one of the largest teachers unions would support Democrats. But to support Republican legislators, whose own constituents oppose every single policy of the Illinois Education Association and their PAC – and for the Republicans to happily accept their contributions – is shocking.

And who suffers? Our children.

For a complete list of contributions made by the Illinois Teachers Union to Republican legislators, check out Thomas DeVore’s
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/100000129683794/posts/pfbid0Dtx9N34DV228mwQA9P11MZJ8xY7syz5AxFma2d89Cb3ECwpXZsmMmeD5XNWeirbCl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
page.

** Breaking: House GOP Leader Jim Durkin Resigning, Says Trump Republicans, 2nd Amendment and Pro-Life Issues "Dragged"
GOP Down in Midterm Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

After more than 24 years in the Illinois legislature, House Republican Minority Leader Jim Durkin is ** resigning (https://www.chicagotribune.com/politics/ct-jim-durkin-resigning-house-seat-20230108-f6f6lkonprdsnmdlzmz3vhc4im-story.html?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Breaking%20News&utm_content=861673214246&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
his seat. In November, the day after the election, ** Durkin (https://abc7chicago.com/jim-durkin-illinois-election-results-2022-news/12438033/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
announced that he was resigning as House Minority Leader. During the midterm election, Durkin suffered embarrassing losses, giving House Democrats once again, supermajority control in the Illinois House. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** GOP State Central Committee's Rhonda Belford Attends 109th First Lady's Luncheon Featuring Jill Biden in September (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/gop-state-central-committees-rhonda-belford-attends-109th-first-ladys-luncheon-featuring-jill-biden-in-september.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Just five weeks before the November midterm election, Republican State Central Committee member ** Rhonda Belford (https://www.facebook.com/100007482462957/posts/pfbid02bysjNfoZ4JNvHi1e4o3p1boFJY7uZ3iPo9REPMZBnCQBUEDgzTdyfr32HPJDLUYVl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, Dist. 12, was in Washington, DC attending the ** 109th First Lady’s Luncheon (https://www.dvflora.com/index.php/2022/10/04/american-grown-flowers-featured-at-109th-first-ladys-luncheon/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
honoring Dr. Jill Biden. Second Gentlemen Douglas Emhoff, husband to Vice President Kamala Harris, was also a featured guest. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/gop-state-central-committees-rhonda-belford-attends-109th-first-ladys-luncheon-featuring-jill-biden-in-september.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/gop-state-central-committees-rhonda-belford-attends-109th-first-ladys-luncheon-featuring-jill-biden-in-september.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ce3c5f2657-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_09_03_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ce3c5f2657-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:

**GOP Kentucky governor candidate sets fast fundraising pace**
"Craft overtook her Republican rivals in fundraising while pouring more than $1 million into her bid to become Kentucky’s next governor"
Peter,

**Did you hear? Billionaire Kelly Craft officially filed her paperwork to run for Kentucky governor last week.** The election year is underway, and this race is already heating up.

**FIRST:** Kelly Craft, the billionaire Trump-appointed former UN ambassador and one of Matt Bevin’s biggest financial supporters, announced her candidacy for governor.

**THEN:** Craft spent over **$1 million** in her campaign, including a six-figure TV ad buy.

**NOW:** Craft added another **$345,000** to her TV ad buy Wednesday. She now leads the field of Andy's opponents in fundraising AND spending, while barely touching her personal fortune.

Kelly Craft has nearly unlimited resources to try to buy this governor's seat, and she'll spend whatever it takes to win. With Craft officially in the race and already blanketing Kentucky airwaves with a new six-figure ad buy, we can't waste any time fighting back.

[**Chip in today to help us fight back against Craft's spending and help us prepare for the long and challenging campaign. clean_body: She’s leading Andy's opponents in fundraising AND spending | GOP Kentucky governor candidate sets fast fundraising pace "Craft overtook her Republican rivals in fundraising while pouring more than $1 million into her bid to become Kentucky’s next governor" Peter, Did you hear? Billionaire Kelly Craft officially filed her paperwork to run for Kentucky governor last week. The election year is underway, and this race is already heating up. FIRST: Kelly Craft, the billionaire Trump-appointed former UN ambassador and one of Matt Bevin’s biggest financial supporters, announced her candidacy for governor. THEN: Craft spent over $1 million in her campaign, including a six-figure TV ad buy. NOW: Craft added another $345,000 to her TV ad buy Wednesday. She now leads the field of Andy's opponents in fundraising AND spending, while barely touching her personal fortune. Kelly Craft has nearly unlimited resources to try to buy this governor's seat, and she'll spend whatever it takes to win. name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0qsjkj0lh54em912el4pmq9t7vo1rsgkpir0qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6o71cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjuvjs50iduv14chacglnn576ceqv2j9ktq4l30_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6o71cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhnva4ca6rinmsbr0n5hf824elqnkakqul9foru8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie6o71cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Giffords
subject: Watch our ten year anniversary video 🎥
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We hope you’ll watch this special video we made to commemorate the ten year anniversary of Giffords
#

Friends -
As we reflect on our ten year anniversary, we’re proud to share a special surprise with you.
Gabby and the whole team wanted to thank you for your support and share some of the highlights of the past ten years we’ve spent fighting for gun safety together.
So, we created a video in honor of this important moment for our organization that we hope you’ll take a few minutes to watch.
[**Will you click here to watch our ten year anniversary video and chip in $10 before the day ends?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-jan23-vid.wXK_i1&refcode=em230109-1-15&t=1&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-jan23-vid.wXK_i1&refcode=em230109-1-15&t=2&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5)
**[WATCH AND DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-jan23-vid.wXK_i1&refcode=em230109-1-15&t=3&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5)**
Ten years of changing hearts, minds, and laws. Ten years of courage. Ten years of saving lives. None of this would be possible without the sustained support of people like you.
**Thank you.**
[**Before the day ends, please watch our ten year anniversary video and chip in to honor this important milestone for our organization.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-jan23-vid.wXK_i1&refcode=em230109-1-15&t=4&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5)
**[WATCH AND DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-jan23-vid.wXK_i1&refcode=em230109-1-15&t=5&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5)**
Thank you for celebrating this occasion with us. It means so much to have you in our movement.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3960%2E3935704%2ECMeXf5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Peter, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108927/386907007/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)
**[Peter, I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first week – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between me and Letitia James? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108928/386907009/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)**
**Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: **

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. **

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first week as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between me and Letitia James?
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Letitia James and Hakeem Jeffries will go through immediately_ | | | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108929/386907010/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)

| | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108930/386907011/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)

| | [Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108932/386907013/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)
---
Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

**[So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first week as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57108933/386907014/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk967-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGEzMDg0Ni02MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLC1mCLWh5RRqptjqIgcsZmTra72FZNdT7wkswaJW78=)**

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zutbs9263s9qbgh04p52i5fn8cdv93krrot1v58o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znlrue4o3envkbmhhgv3u8m9f4iq7so7f31js378_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z09pu9fqf7sa91vpntpugo9n971e06gh781itkjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zjugese83h7uir9guptfaed13jlfg6ji4ialt8s8).

name: United American Patriots
subject: a grave injustice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
We owe it to them to fight for their freedom.
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbpmkgoldu0eh09o3504pgb73op4jo70m72atcvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
Friend, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. _For every American._ These Warriors put on their uniforms every day – and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. **And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. **
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hfhqberqj3360d2tlqlaocaj8oe3te1jhv15k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars.
---
[**GET JUSTICE FOR THE MARSOC 3**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0obair0i2iscs0g9gntrgado0ij0t907ifu7v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen.
**The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics._[FIGHT FOR JUSTICE >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zicr36he72fnpobkhlfk3e74nj7pqpdq68mip1bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)_**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zndtarjc7qr9c3j1384egp6a9q27tm84kcqd5qu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
**_[Friend, we’re reaching out to freedom-loving Americans like you because we need YOUR help to defend the MARSOC 3.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvirkpvu8iskoln8u80b6o4nvctb5qk4jlnh6470_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)_** United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we’re approaching a critical milestone. **After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, a****January 17th****trial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron.** This is where you come in, friend. We’re counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial.
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcluuii36uthhrbnv8ciqt9j5ft15dn4941rndr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4md2bdnmm66v609489f5km39lvqudv2bmfuef4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmlhgcuh1u3noo6l98ve2nn8hrqail2hmsj576pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $35**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm6trlg027qvhcpeak62iq42lhbne2ru20a7mj60_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: OTHER**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztine7jrlk52gpeccft2hcdo2lufkfnca7j7ag1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it’s CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. **_[If you can, friend, please rush a critical donation to our Warrior Fund and help Gunnery Sergeants Danny Dreher and Joshua Negron of the MARSOC 3.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu7g90g0sipnnpbsse3uani4bkksrm6vm6gckr50_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)_**
---
[**RUSH A CRITICAL DONATION**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8t25lhqr71rrv0o4eqjh8bs44vargs3sdlb9g18_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9ie1o32cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for your help. Semper Fi’

And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars. It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we’re approaching a critical milestone. After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, aJanuary 17thtrial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron. This is where you come in, friend. We’re counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial. Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it’s CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. Thank you for your help. Semper Fi’ David “Bull” Gurfein LtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. **The past week has been a window into what the next two years will look like: Republicans creating chaos and preventing us from taking action on the issues that matter to American families and workers.**

name: JazzLewis.com
subject: Bold agenda
body:
In case you missed it, last week we announced that Speaker Jones named Jazz Maryland House Majority Whip! After serving for the past three years as Caucus Chair, Jazz will continue fighting for the people in this new leadership role.

But right now, we need your help to start this year strong. Because Jazz doesn't come from money, our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to keep us going. Once the legislative session begins, we won’t be able to fundraise, so Jazz needs your help right away. Will you chip in what you can right now to help bring in 43 more donations before the noon January 11 fundraising deadline so Jazz can keep fighting for our families in the General Assembly? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

Jazz believes if we work together, we can make big things happen. That’s why he is committed to a bold agenda of strengthening the middle-class economy, empowering small businesses, ensuring police accountability, and making critical investments in our communities.

Will you do your part and give right away before our January 11 Deadline Goal so Jazz can focus on passing critical legislation to move our communities forward this session? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode=Janemails]

Anything you can give will be a huge help.

Let’s do this,

Team Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]
by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son
body:
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlUAUUtRSks27WQU594puTqQlhFRS8gPmcqFXoITlIIee8qG8nUHH6K8PuDF7lHGjbttlfjXi91m8xeaHyogqVxhRwNuTR7Bm0107bmFDTQi7yv-Pj4Fc2v3mGZPFWta-EF35VZ7hbX85jNcvYH7IStI%3D) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. **Mark 's trial is set to begin on January 24th**, so we're running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** - ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlfLuQWj9InFHr1c3dWSJjhAOrrpmtsWVEjJX7oOGANvwwwSNJDmNU0aa8Qi9a4X4aZje4zydzutLc7m_EWSab4FpCs5ml5QVCw8DZCosgOfJ4gyQjM4FNBJ95zspk_lMo7QUNVKqeF5mhMMXCrT4p7M%3D) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlTUl_dm3WjHvacD4rFQjJE5L1x_fIh8lt33scuzrrkXPrwJ9MxyrGlv79oy_pScxt-CXVTM355y0gBWs7yeUFx7Brkxkh-JpgIdh5B5d0qIa1ngP7htdM9egDx8sAq36vILoHC6pp_X08jFZy5M5-VQ%3D) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlVhfdIPOQ7oQMT_dYy4r9MQsLWrB9qIQkOhA-ENV8DXTqb4PMUlwhISeV1FlBtcec2ARNbb_PICFbv1f5K-8T05GXFkSJC4-A4vuxio6Owh4Sm4HBj4uBkPftFYQmDETFlPMwlf4Di6n97uXJ2rQIQo%3D) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don't hesitate! I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense fund of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlYTCn2c_8_E-hUiBg7Srk-eGf6sj6szRiRtVC2SLl6ffCf2zDF3ErWlbtejzm6TNFP8-aJIXiaHGgn8zsBPdv03UDAfT9tGWUW_chZW7x3aLNTjmto176SKVzs7LDdgGz8J7PRLOskJTR8tEI7qtyio%3D)
---
[**DONATE
**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlRg9qjLuMJGoCy7Dc7I2eDLAesDIHL5EBGR-VF2EFu6_8oMvi_DWkWNvbrj0Yi-EU66Zkh6JEdLZltAP2w4MrU0G8XItU6INC3mx4IoY6drNl37zvoo3LhEzccptlO0hQ0z5GQ1N9hvA-hhxIFj6mro%3D)

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c65f404541a645a3a22132d0da93d9e9&_e=qw_3GIYhOBDH0gij5XX1MopgnkBBGTW4F6mZ8hk2I1kXTS7-FAST2uAxfNYg5gu-ku4uw3xwzx2FPq-hYKmbImXe2WfTozfwZPxrnITaMEr12CNaovtXMpCzVi2gNuTOvI9Aww1AqsmYLTFYc6lmR4QwP2UeIVgU4Q31Pu3qUUUELQRy0OtOCQ7vMkyseU9ls2srqM1ufEL7lRwXTW8XlRPxOGMvXSa3HmIvBtNwFW0iiXrxBK7CknrynLt7XJ1JotA4p458tw0ldTYFa5aOB50QImxXqHeCE1QQD4ktxip5IVoaCTpTWp_6piqMwATOeIs5GDZASt4fEwa8bLrdWgvxZCaqxhNEP7EJ3K5zPqo%3D)

name: The Gun People
subject: I'm 1776% sure no one will be taking...
body:
This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11167/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/e2f721b2b17640bdab8de07e115cebcc5b6d8b08). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11167/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/e2f721b2b17640bdab8de07e115cebcc5b6d8b08?message_id=ImI0ZTQyMzQwLTcyOTctMDEzYi04ODMxLTQyMDEwYTgwMDBkOEB0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
It was 1776 when America gave Great Britain the finger and said “we’re out.”
For two-and-and-half centuries we Americans have enjoyed unadulterated, in-your-face freedom. (Despite the left wing’s best efforts.)

And I think we can both agree that one thing has provided us with this freedom that we love and cherish.

Our God-given right to bear arms.

And if you're anything like us, you like to help preserve this legacy by showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

(Plus we find it’s a great snowflake repellent.)

That’s why we took this iconic number and had a little something engraved on our premium quality tumblers.

Because **I am 1776% sure no one will be taking my guns!**
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
And nothing makes me feel more like a red-blooded American patriot...
Than sipping Kentucky’s finest out of this bad boy while watching a snowflake run for a “safe space.”

The best part is you can make a day of it since the double-wall insulation keeps cold drinks cold for 24 hours. (And hot drinks are hot for 8 hours!)

**This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again.** Engraved by freedom-loving Americans in Boise, Idaho Food Grade 18/8 Stainless Steel Construction Fits and any truck or car cup holder Never rusts...even after collecting salty liberal tears Leak-proof lid for those bumpy roads or stormy fishing days Superior finish (Sweat-proof!) Fits 20oz of American whiskey, beer, water, coffee, etc 30-day money-back guarantee Makes the PERFECT gift This rugged tumbler is 100% awesome and 0% liberal.

So if you're unapologetically American and you like your beverages to stay icy cold, or scalding hot...

This Freedom Tumbler is for you.

And I have some excellent news for you today.

Because for a very limited time, [you can get your own Freedom Tumbler at just a fraction of the normal price.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11167/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/e2f721b2b17640bdab8de07e115cebcc5b6d8b08)

If you were to go directly to our online store, you’d pay USD40 for this piece of badassery.

And we sell them at that price every single day of the week.

But I’m on a mission to make this thing go “viral.”

So right now you can get your very own Freedom Tumbler for only USD40 USD19.

Hell, at that price you can get one for you and a friend and still pay half of what one normally costs.

The only catch is, I set aside some of these for this special sale...and right now we only have 694 left as of the sending of this email!

And once those are gone you’ll have to pay the normal price of USD40.

I think we can both agree that USD19 is a small price to pay for showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

Plus pissing off whiny liberal snowflakes everywhere you go is _priceless._

**[GO HERE to claim your Freedom Tumbler for 50% OFF](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11167/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/e2f721b2b17640bdab8de07e115cebcc5b6d8b08)**

So if you're ready to trigger a liberal just by enjoying a tasty beverage, you better hurry.

Because this IS a limited-time offer and these WILL sell out fast.

We’ve mostly been getting orders for multiple tumblers at this incredible price, so I really don’t know how much longer these will be available.

But if you order now, your Freedom Tumbler will be delivered to your front door in the next 3-5 days.

And since you're backed by our 30-day, 100% guarantee...

There’s no risk on your part.

If you're not 100% satisfied, email our support team and we’ll refund you every penny. But I don’t see that happening, to be honest.

**Just look at what other 2nd amendment supporters are saying about their Freedom Tumblers**

“ _Fist bumps, thumbs up, smiles, and some gal passed me her number at Starbucks....so be ready.”_ **Robert B. – Omaha, NE**

_“When drinking from this tumbler, I have bald eagles wearing American flags as capes swoop down and land on my arm. I get the nods and the handshakes when walking around, rocking this tumbler. People appreciate my badassness when representing.”_ **Justin G. – Toledo, OH**

_“I bought one for myself, now every member of the family wants one.”_ **Lenny P. – Marcus Hook, PA**

Remember, these are only 50% off until I sell the remaining ones.

**[GO HERE to get your Freedom Tumbler now](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11167/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/e2f721b2b17640bdab8de07e115cebcc5b6d8b08)**

There’s never been a more important time than now to stand up for our rights.

Thanks for being a fellow patriot!
---
|
---
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: debt in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
our (victorious!) campaign is in debt, and I need your help
| | |
---
Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.

Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt.

We’ve made progress retiring that debt, but we’ve still got a ways to go and it would be great if we could erase that deficit.

You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: **[Please chip in $3 or as much as you can so that our (victorious!) campaign can eliminate our debt once and for all and I can focus on serving Granite Staters in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57093506/386876590/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2180-fr-NH-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U0ZGViZi0zZjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVbDSzxuFmPqBFiaGBymIyn6C0uFluHqQrCkJdVR0uE=) **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57093507/386876591/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2180-fr-NH-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U0ZGViZi0zZjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVbDSzxuFmPqBFiaGBymIyn6C0uFluHqQrCkJdVR0uE=)

clean_body: our (victorious!) campaign is in debt, and I need your help | | | Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different. Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt. We’ve made progress retiring that debt, but we’ve still got a ways to go and it would be great if we could erase that deficit. You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m proud of the work that this team put in to hold on to New Hampshire’s Senate seat. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlp20ppno0qvqjmu7isoipu1it60dm0rbd9rr46o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z671k9gh8buc8n3lkvc20ufpr93sh8fup2jcshgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or1c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zei8k3obl85h9t0lhuar8dgebiru5nck2585jnm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or1c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6caih2bd7jhvkj1e7cdhedve9l1168s6ckass00_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or1c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: To the Supreme Court we go

body:
it will be worth it.

---
Hey,

I wanted you to be the first to know:

**I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court.
**
**[Rush a donation so we can keep pushing this case! They want us to stop but we must prove them WRONG.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1okv3jnv6i6n229buccvtu74bag86r1v61p668_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or4cph2bs)
**
The complete and utter CHAOS that was the Arizona governor election needs to be EXAMINED BY THE SUPREME COURT!

**I will not concede. Why? Because Katie Hobbs was not duly elected.
**
I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard

**_[Stop Katie Hobbs.
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuev2lll141m4k32f9oipc2fipvkmumm9dm8dkeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpg68or4cph2bs) [Stop the corruption.

I know this is an uphill battle, but I promise you it will be worth it.

God bless,

Kari Lake

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: After last week, the focus is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xQ1CR1LgH2BkHVEmXb4haGLIBLoODGZOlpSYiBZZjRU=/WEbbHMXTCg45y3DU4VLX-IHKezWZcyyt7R3vYuogUy8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230109-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

As I sat on the House floor last week -- day after day -- while we cast our Speaker votes, I witnessed firsthand the chaos that exists across the aisle. I saw the brinkmanship, the antics, the capitulation, and yes, the almost-fist fight up close. Amid that chaos, I thought about what guided me to run for Congress and what fuels my work every day. It's my commitment to our communities and our country and my belief in the people I serve.

As we head into this new Congress and all the challenges before us, my campaign team and I are already beginning preparations for the next campaign.

The foundation we build now will have a profound impact on the success of our future campaign. One thing is for certain, races in VA-07 will continue to be incredibly close, and the support we build now means everything. [_**With that in mind, will you play a vital role in building our campaign by becoming a 2023 founding donor today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xQ1CR1LgH2BkHVEmXb4haGLIBLoODGZOlpSYiBZZjRU=/WEbbHMXTCg45y3DU4VLX-IHKezWZcyyt7R3vYuogUy8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230109-1-EM&amount=25)

I'm proud of the work I've taken up in Congress. From capping the cost of live-saving insulin at $35 per month to securing key investments to fix our roads and bridges, expand rural broadband internet access, and build a greener future, it was a productive term.

But there's so much more I hope to accomplish for this community, and I need your support to make sure I can continue my important work.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: i need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
_Hi — I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $5 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-hassan-fetterman](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49640?refcode=em20230109-8202&t=1&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)**_
Derek — the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
**[Will you please give $5 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and John Fetterman’s, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49640?refcode=em20221229-8202&t=2&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)**
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49648?refcode=em20230109-8202&t=21&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)**
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230109-8202-footer&t=22&refcode2=8202_434096_yB2U7O&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=8202%2E434096%2EyB2U7O)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Teaching your children about the dangers of socialism
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d366a05347dd4cf09daacfd9f5d84f6f&_e=d0je0wHslwOD7rTe0eS9J8_E08TZuJYH-XCuvtzuiAg2DrAiRTBRZ2gf7o0galSp3azwmUhp_YIhHw9-bqIxHCTO7GIazgXd1Yve-de4YluJfjn6EVfAf_akV8l0DBR5qBqLgDIvM8ZliWKr1nFdAXRPb2hy9cDOt2c0htUfUwAHEa91F975CCz_fsrj58ByZZVMTucLa0xcfjELdMRJ58Dc9RbuDHNCvUPeYM2KZxgsfXkSxKxVgtTzvo1UJe3EFqdqv4lTWl8P8yQ04UMbRKtAP6zrZIfr3m_WpUQzkZ_JQEVsr4jn16VFaIaFCQMgU_K9Br3BUuV5OLoStZcDDpjMI3S8aVuLtZ8K8Y3AvxI%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d366a05347dd4cf09daacfd9f5d84f6f&_e=d0je0wHslwOD7rTe0eS9J8_E08TZuJYH-XCuvtzuiAg2DrAiRTBRZ2gf7o0galSp3azwmUhp_YIhHw9-bqIxHCTO7GIazgXd1Yve-de4YluJfjn6EVfAf_akV8l0DBR5qBqLgDIvM8ZliWKr1nFdAXRPb2hy9cDOt2c0htUfUwAHEa91F975CCz_fsrj58ByZZVMTucLa0xcfjELdMRJ5-3UPuNFqoDbfX9XLFVsXG1HidRc0GTTFlT3zlI5sNqSGD0VANltPUiEzTZm3Xd_RCqJ_e13cQBSVmPdN962NEXr8TlaUUx2lLzBwjtR5tRS5lGxT8cruvu-JbUJE50LVU6X_q7DKVsl-iiFz7j04p8%3D)_

| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d366a05347dd4cf09daacfd9f5d84f6f&_e=d0je0wHslwOD7rTe0eS9J8_E08TZuJYH-XCuvtzuiAg2DrAiRTBRZ2gf7o0galSp3azwmUhp_YIhHw9-bqIxHCTO7GIazgXd1Yve-de4YluJfjn6EVfAf_akV8l0DBR5qBqLgDIvM8ZliWKr1nFdAXRPb2hy9cDOt2c0htUfUwAHEa91F975CCz_fsrj58ByZZVMTucLa0xcfjELdMRJ51aXeZtKeinLDfekBQ_22vGQAoCwvb8TlKKkM70TT6-c2mMA1G1Y0DyVqcJlGs0VPLoLU3k-KR8N29wA-jIyQYnNGJ8MYYpFh8t_DQQoy0KSRlbg18qnAXOuawN26YEW9l54vHo2oFRKDn7-TqyP5lg%3D)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d366a05347dd4cf09daacfd9f5d84f6f&_e=d0je0wHslwOD7rTe0eS9J8_E08TZuJYH-XCuvtzuiAg2DrAiRTBRZ2gf7o0galSp3azwmUhp_YIhHw9-bqIxHCTO7GIazgXd1Yve-de4YluJfjn6EVfAf_akV8l0DBR5qBqLgDIvM8ZliWKr1nFdAXRPb2hy9cDOt2c0htUfUwAHEa91F975CCz_fsrj58ByZZVMTucLa0xcfjELdMRJ5319LfaG4Ip9D-IzNcB8c3qb_VRMc4992yZNHQoND9FUlNRs2W7-XKNGNdhMNWjnv0KTwnxSR0KCbWCuNQcA7s_uboCsxRendGJa97ee6LZuklxY-NFrcFlx1u1mtSNlihOgpvJPKL9A4exdzfnEkRs%3D)

Connor Boyack

[I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Josh Gottheimer? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57094504/386880248/-1944673129?amount=10&refcode2=df81adcc-4290-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=JG_EM_FR_30DO_20230109_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjgxYWRjYy00MjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-DZR5JsiGIQncsNc3yKcqm0WRYMOVHfWfrKqaNydCe4=)
