Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[So I’m humbly asking you to split a donation between me and The Collective PAC and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAnYabYyGIX0iAfcikzvy_xv-xxPxSmgqXtRij6F8j6N1V1qT1gjZIVWSHAgEe-Xt3LLEYK85Wk6qBH3YjIJfV_qjcBPcfP3BarIxD43QWvU1S-IH98N4QwLfWIbVkJUJ1q4f1F8nXztNrX3KwbPL33pw1Vma_vkqu5SmfZbEJ9Ojjvk72oZltlZUPkdUF91Mpa8Xq5d0LNCA6vvE_h3Nw-NZ59BA99JEbTqP76-kPJPZbvP1m_SS0jqqgKVI8U4ba8E8qTWWF8HQA8GR7s1yxNlfRR4kuIpdRo7-JZJZJ5mwh2J4PGoA5YLSAoqTYCk3L/3sp/ucy7YBeBRgOtBRs-oEKvYw/h10/owcvYYDO6sRQ9jD478PTdqtsDbi6Nup7699ezRasu1s)

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57110631/386914147/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20230109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I2ODM1ODMtNmQ5MC1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HYN52LpqVXotxFMYFJlgFgpzQK-pEOdQ_2RzcO6aNSs=)
---
Peter, After 15 embarrassing attempts, Kevin McCarthy finally secured the votes to be elected Speaker of the House. So we thought we’d take a moment to remind you of some of his worst moments: 😡 He hightailed it to Mar-a-Lago just three weeks after the events of January 6th to grovel at the feet of Donald Trump. 😡 He said he personally would “support” a nationwide abortion ban. 😡 He voted _against_ a resolution condemning violence against Asian American communities. 😡 He was a major supporter of the _Defense of Marriage Act,_ and voted against the _Respect for Marriage Act_ passed last year. Kevin McCarthy is not just an embarrassment — he poses a real threat to women, LGBTQ+, and people of color in this country. We have to stand up to his hatred and bigotry, and kick him out of the speakership come 2024. [_**We already have plans in place to take back the House in 2024 — can you help us do it with just $10 (or more!) right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57110632/386914148/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20230109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I2ODM1ODMtNmQ5MC1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HYN52LpqVXotxFMYFJlgFgpzQK-pEOdQ_2RzcO6aNSs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57110633/386914149/-1914796982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20230109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I2ODM1ODMtNmQ5MC1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HYN52LpqVXotxFMYFJlgFgpzQK-pEOdQ_2RzcO6aNSs=)

clean_body: | = Peter, After 15 embarrassing attempts, Kevin McCarthy finally secured the votes to be elected Speaker of the House. So we thought we’d take a moment to remind you of some of his worst moments: 😡 He hightailed it to Mar-a-Lago just three weeks after the events of January 6th to grovel at the feet of Donald Trump. 😡 He said he personally would “support” a nationwide abortion ban. 😡 He voted against a resolution condemning violence against Asian American communities. 😡 He was a major supporter of the Defense of Marriage Act, and voted against the Respect for Marriage Act passed last year. Kevin McCarthy is not just an embarrassment — he poses a real threat to women, LGBTQ+, and people of color in this country. We have to stand up to his hatred and bigotry, and kick him out of the speakership come 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! Blood, sweat, and tears will only get us so far. Can you spare ANYTHING to help me and my team fight for YOU? | God Bless you, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Shift WA
subject: Help fact-check Inslee
body:
The mainstream media will do nothing to fact-check Jay Inslee's State of the State address. That's why we need your help to fact-check his usual lies and phony claims of success. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362269:sve5E2DN1:m:1:2610672541:2F1A1A4CD742AF23F46809CD3BD34017:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Jay Inslee will deliver his annual State of the State address tomorrow (Tuesday, January 10th) at noon. The 2023 Legislative Session will officially commence on Wednesday.

Our state has seemingly no end of pressing challenges to solve. Communities across the state are suffering from the impacts of skyrocketing crime. Deadly drugs like fentanyl are flooding our neighborhoods at unprecedented rates. Homelessness is growing while government continues to pump billions into failing "solutions."

Yet - despite all these challenges - Inslee is expected to focus his 2023 address to our state on the need to expand on his extreme (and failing) green energy policies. He will also concentrate his comments on "abortion rights." After delivering his extreme remarks, Inslee will - undoubtedly - spend a portion of his speech gaslighting the public by praising his ineffective record.

The mainstream media will do nothing to fact-check Inslee on any of his extreme comments or claims of success. And that's why we need your help.

**[Will you help us fact-check Inslee's State of the State tomorrow at noon?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362270:sve5E2DN1:m:1:2610672541:2F1A1A4CD742AF23F46809CD3BD34017:r)**

Simply [**click here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362270:sve5E2DN1:m:1:2610672541:2F1A1A4CD742AF23F46809CD3BD34017:r) to write in the biggest lie that Inslee tells tomorrow, and we'll highlight the responses on our website following his speech.
**> >> [HELP FACT-CHECK INSLEE](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362270:sve5E2DN1:m:1:2610672541:2F1A1A4CD742AF23F46809CD3BD34017:r) <<<**
Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61362271:sve5E2DN1:m:1:2610672541:2F1A1A4CD742AF23F46809CD3BD34017:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14108613&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osve5E2DN1).
---

name: Dan Goldman
subject: A new year, a new Congress, and a new email program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter, after a long week of Republican chaos and disarray, I am excited to finally be sworn-in as a United States Congressman.

And with this new year, new Congress, and new role, I am also excited to begin a new and different email program that will include fewer emails with greater depth and substance so that you, my committed supporter, can get a better sense of what I’m doing in New York’s Tenth District and Washington.

I wish I was writing today with an update on the first bill I introduced, or the Committees and caucuses I’ve joined, or the work you propelled me to Washington to do.

But sadly, I spent most of my first week sitting on the House floor watching a disorganized, chaotic and dysfunctional Republican party fail to achieve the most basic objective of organizing the House.

The Washington Post:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsg_em_jan23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsg_em_jan23]

Republicans moving in reverse would be comical if it weren’t so deeply concerning. In order to finally ascend to the Speakership, Rep. Kevin McCarthy, a man with no vision, values or ideology, ceded total control over the House to the extremist MAGA wing of the Republican Party.

Make no mistake, the MAGA Caucus is driving the Republican Party bus.

McCarthy’s concessions include:

1.
Allowing
any
member
of
the
MAGA
Caucus
to
call
a
vote
to
remove
McCarthy
as
Speaker
for
any
reason.
Remember,
McCarthy
only
got
216
votes
to
become
Speaker,
which
would
not
be
enough
if
every
member
of
Congress
voted.
This
makes
him
completely
beholden
to
the
MAGA
Caucus.

2.
Any
increase
in
the
debt
ceiling
must
be
paired
with
a
comparable
decrease
in
spending.
The
practical
reality
of
this
concession
is
that
McCarthy
has
agreed
to
raise
the
debt
ceiling
–
which
allows
the
United
States
government
to
pay
interest
on
its
debts
previously
agreed
to
–
only
if
there
is
a
dramatic
cut
to
Social
Security,
Medicare
and
Medicaid.

3.
A
rules
package
that
guts
the
Office
of
Congressional
Ethics
–
the
body
that
conducts
investigations
on
behalf
of
the
House
Ethics
Committee
–
and
prohibits
congressional
offices
from
unionizing.
Indeed,
just
as
the
Republican
Party
welcomes
serially
liar
and
fraudster
George
Santos
into
their
ranks,
McCarthy
and
the
Republicans
are
making
it
near-impossible
for
Congress
to
investigate
him.

4.
The
creation
of
a
special
committee
to
investigate
the
“Weaponization
of
the
Federal
Government.”
They
can
dress
up
the
name,
but,
as
I
describe
in
more
detail
below,
this
special
committee
is
solely
intended
to
interfere
with
ongoing
investigations
of
the
Department
of
Justice,
including
those
into
possible
members
of
the
committee
itself.

The GOP Committee to Obstruct Justice

I spent 10 years as a federal prosecutor with the Department of Justice, and charged numerous defendants with obstruction of justice.

In 2019, as Senior Advisor and Director of Investigations for the House Intelligence Committee, I spearheaded Congress’s effort to obtain documents and materials – some classified – underlying Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s Report on Russian interference in the 2016 election, which included detailed evidence of then-President Donald Trump’s efforts to obstruct justice.

Later in 2019, I served as lead counsel in the impeachment investigation of then-President Trump, who was impeached for his abuse of power and for obstructing our investigation.

More recently, I, like many of you, have observed continued efforts by former President Trump to obstruct DOJ’s investigations into the 2020 election and his unauthorized possession of classified documents.

I remind you of my background because it is important context when I say unequivocally that the so-called “special Committee to Investigate the Weaponization of the Federal Government” is a thinly-veiled effort to achieve a single objective:

Obstruct the new Special Counsel’s current investigations into a conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election and former President Trump’s unauthorized possession of classified materials and – you guessed it – to obstruct justice.

That is why I call this new special committee the GOP Committee to Obstruct Justice.

This improper and unwarranted committee would be bad enough if it were simply trying to do Donald Trump’s dirty work. But it gets worse.

The Special Counsel’s investigation into the 2020 election also includes Republican members of Congress, including Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA), whose cell phone was seized and searched pursuant to a court-authorized search warrant based on a finding of probable cause that the phone would contain evidence of a crime related to his role in trying to overturn the 2020 election.

Yesterday, Rep. Perry said he hopes to get a seat on the Committee to Obstruct Justice. Put another way, Scott Perry hopes to get a seat on a Congressional committee designed to obstruct a federal criminal investigation into himself.

This isn’t just a conflict of interest. This is a Trump-level abuse of power, and the latest Republican attempt to normalize authoritarian behavior and ensure those who tried to overthrow our government never face consequences.

Peter, we can’t forget that the same Republicans who fomented the attack on our democracy on January 6 continued their assault on democracy this week by making it impossible for Congress to do the people’s work. And they now intend to continue to undermine our democracy by interfering in lawful investigations to protect Donald Trump and themselves.

I ran for Congress to stand up to these authoritarian forces in the Republican Party. And I promise you that I will do everything I can to prevent further attacks on our democracy and the rule of law.

If you can support my efforts to fight for our values and institutions with a small donation below, I’d be very grateful. I’m thankful to have you in my corner to preserve and protect our democracy.

— Dan

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsg_em_jan23]
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]
Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lRuS4-CjnEe3IkMH5LeSZA2?unsubscribedata=HaYxjGeAqgDB1U3SFF8M8ESWOqLJLMgBuLzhlAHa5mjFTsoiMz8NhDLnUaoFoEJioT6UoVCQYnhuIAKbTh8IRizfxDy%2F7EH4V4lYNEqzh0BjXTqy7Xv%2FUPE4YMsAzjsr%2F7W9NctKbkog1HPTSg9lqhBlFbF7xXyoHdL4OWL7UyXb5edgwQawoUnF4thriQkcKBAFBXfZ%2BGPZ8SI6vaEVG3JYcFSCg%2BHinZIXsio%2F8HOXeiQigdsG%2FJSf42j4ZlIKgkQgkHp%2FErqA9XLDDMQ0ALk7klMK29Azf5hAYktn%2BTmDVc%2Fst0bL7kVTKxG0Z1hS3F8AQm%2B%2FC9A6ClFnkK2ikdrDhwUr7r8212NpWfYMb3A74f%2BzN2IhXScUH895wfY4Ssg%2Fb%2F%2BBzTtMlSz2uHSqtwy%2BhEp8NomH0frnH3XmTifJWEGQEDr9DWKXzV0yZRNm]

body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111393/386916774/1016669012?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ4ZDA1Ny03MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wF0HNUu2QpTIc_9KsfZwddzmv0gjZUs3eRlTIDZ_81k=)
Folks, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. **[_Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Jacky Rosen? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111394/386916775/1016669012?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ4ZDA1Ny03MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wF0HNUu2QpTIc_9KsfZwddzmv0gjZUs3eRlTIDZ_81k=)**

**Look,****as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**
I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. **

[**Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people._Can I count on you to split a gift between me and Jacky Rosen?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111395/386916776/1546212190?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ4ZDA1Ny03MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wF0HNUu2QpTIc_9KsfZwddzmv0gjZUs3eRlTIDZ_81k=)

Listen, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. **

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

**[_So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority. >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111400/386916781/1016669012?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2304-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ4ZDA1Ny03MTkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wF0HNUu2QpTIc_9KsfZwddzmv0gjZUs3eRlTIDZ_81k=)**

Keep the faith,

name: Hakeem Jeffries (via RBG)
subject: I was just sworn in:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15008?t=6&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8) [**Friends, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Ron Be Gone? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15010?t=8&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)

**So folks, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Ron Be Gone? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15016?t=14&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15017?t=15&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15018?t=16&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)
Fellow Democrats, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[**So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15010?t=18&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)
Keep the faith,

_Hakeem_
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8).**

[Click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Beat Ron DeSantis »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/120?t=4&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/121?t=5&akid=1639%2E564421%2ENlxmd8)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57096772/386887843/-1561017647?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230109_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA4Mzc3Yy00YjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVibBXrALGJDwJC-sAjTQSl6yrE1IiT2MgpqLp8GeR4=) [**Peter, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed attempts. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Rep. Mark Takano? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57096773/386887844/-1561017647?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230109_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA4Mzc3Yy00YjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVibBXrALGJDwJC-sAjTQSl6yrE1IiT2MgpqLp8GeR4=)

**Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Rep. Mark Takano? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57096781/386887852/-1561017647?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230109_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA4Mzc3Yy00YjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVibBXrALGJDwJC-sAjTQSl6yrE1IiT2MgpqLp8GeR4=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57096785/386887856/-1561017647?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=MTFC_20230109_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA4Mzc3Yy00YjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVibBXrALGJDwJC-sAjTQSl6yrE1IiT2MgpqLp8GeR4=)
Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans. I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

clean_body: | = = Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: I was raised by working-class parents. I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn. Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Rep. Mark Takano? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans. I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it. I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. In the early hours of Saturday morning, I had the humbling honor of being sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives for the 118th Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57112104/386919788/-1098250704?refcode=em-20230109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc2ZTk2YS03ODkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XcOCqMl7E-aFi5-q_2qZmRvyD7_DvytbwExfwVvFLgc=)
We didn’t get here by accident. I ran on an unapologetic, progressive, pro-worker platform — a platform that deeply resonated with our communities and the growing progressive movement in the heart of Texas. Now, I’m ready to make good on the promises of my campaign, but I can’t do it alone. Together, we will fight to restore abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, and win good-paying union jobs for all.
**Standing together in solidarity is more important than ever, Peter. As House Republicans embrace authoritarianism and division we need as much support as possible to stand united for democracy.[Will you chip in $5, $10 or even $20 today to help us continue to strategize, fight back, and stand in solidarity with working Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57112105/386919789/-1098250704?refcode=em-20230109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc2ZTk2YS03ODkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XcOCqMl7E-aFi5-q_2qZmRvyD7_DvytbwExfwVvFLgc=)**
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57112106/386919790/-1098250704?refcode=em-20230109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc2ZTk2YS03ODkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XcOCqMl7E-aFi5-q_2qZmRvyD7_DvytbwExfwVvFLgc=)****
---
If the last few days and years have taught us anything, it’s that nothing can be taken for granted. As an organizer, and your congressman, I will recommit myself to our shared vision every single day because it is a huge show of your trust in me that I am here today.
**All I ask in return is that you bring your own unique contribution to this movement, whether how you sow seeds of compassion in your own community, your artistic talents, your policy ideas, or your community service — it’s going to take all of us, and our individual gifts to not only power this movement but sustain it for the long-haul.**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Let’s get to work for Texans and for working families across America.
With gratitude,
Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_
_**[P.S. If you can, I would appreciate your continued support with a financial contribution to our campaign today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57112108/386919792/999811520?refcode=em-20230109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc2ZTk2YS03ODkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XcOCqMl7E-aFi5-q_2qZmRvyD7_DvytbwExfwVvFLgc=), but if you are unable to at this time, know that I am still grateful for your presence and participation in this movement. I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager — _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years — _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging — _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House — the right way — but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

_[So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 72 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57098095/386889320/-245629503?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20230109_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjUyNDM5ZC00ZjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ARcyomQOkwP4PiQ2TDCU_RwCOkjsh1CQ6_fQ5jk8tKQ=)_

Keep the faith,

Hakeem

clean_body: There's only 1 day left before state Democrats face a competitive election in Virginia | | | | | SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE: In one short day Democrats will face a competitive election for Virginia’s open state Senate seat. Virginia is one of our top targets this year, so the outcome of this race (the first competitive special election this year!) could have ripple effects for state Democrats in 2023. A win for state Democrats would widen our tight margin in the Virginia Senate, building our Democratic momentum. Simply put: With the future of abortion access, public education, voting rights, and much more at risk; we must take advantage of this opportunity to gain ground for Democrats in Virginia. name: Katie Porter
subject: Reading on the House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
This past week I sought refuge in books, a lifelong practice that helped me survive rough and tumble siblings and being a single mom.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15630%2E3422442%2EmFI23_)
Derek,
The House floor is loud, bright, and challenging. This past week I sought refuge in books, a lifelong practice that helped me survive rough and tumble siblings and being a single mom. I read _Love and Other Words_ by Christina Lauren (a 47th district constituent), _Expatriates_ by Janice Y.K. Lee, and _When Life Gives you LuluLemons_ by Lauren Weisburger.**And if you saw the photo,****_The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck_ by Mark Manson.**
I get my books from the library whenever possible, or other freecycle sources. _The Subtle Art_ came from a little free library in my neighborhood in the NE section of DC. I always take a peek when I need a new book, and I’ll be dropping it back off this week.
**Here are some lessons I have learned from this book:**
1. There will be struggles and pain along the way as you live. **Choose a goal where you enjoy the struggle**. For me, I LOVE campaigning, so while the House floor was a struggle this past week, I thought back to all the amazing conversations at doors, rallies with volunteers, and encouraging notes from supporters.
2. You are not special. **This is an important reminder for elected officials.** Every American has struggles at work, and bad days and sometimes late late nights. Congress is no different. There are challenging co-workers, projects that go awry, and bad outcomes at every workplace.
3. Don’t hope for a life without problems. Hope for a life full of good problems. **The privilege of serving in Congress has problems** —but they are good problems: the opportunity to improve the lives of Americans and to protect our democracy.

Thanks to all of the supporters who helped send me back to Congress this year. I am so grateful for your support.
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15630%2E3422442%2EmFI23_).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Team Durbin
subject: What’s on your mind?

body:
Share your 2023 priorities with Senator Durbin now.
#
Peter,
The Senate will be back in session soon — and thanks to hard work and continued support from Democrats like you, Senator Durbin will be joined by a newly-expanded majority in Washington.
It’s already clear that the Republican House will be chaotic. But in the Senate, Democrats will be doing everything they can to fight for the issues that are most important to you and your family.
**[Will you take a moment to fill out Senator Durbin’s survey and share your priorities for the coming year? There are no wrong answers. We want to hear what’s on your mind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57105932/386895006/1911999063?refcode=dd_em_230109_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230109_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzM4ZjViZS01NDkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8N08CIvaxAghZ66-ZIU-3mBQgMWXozqKCYwWjt9lbpA=&emci=dec4a848-5190-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ec38f5be-5490-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)**
Gun violence. Education. Climate. Reproductive rights. Judges. There are so many critical issues for the Senate to tackle. They are all important — but Senator Durbin wants to know what priorities you have for Democrats in the coming Senate session. Let him know now >>>
**[Which issues are top of mind for you? Take the brief survey now to share your thoughts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57105933/386895007/1911999063?refcode=dd_em_230109_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230109_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzM4ZjViZS01NDkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8N08CIvaxAghZ66-ZIU-3mBQgMWXozqKCYwWjt9lbpA=&emci=dec4a848-5190-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ec38f5be-5490-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)**

Team Durbin

name: me, Kari (2)
subject: To the Supreme Court we go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
it will be worth it.
it will be worth it.

| [ ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbshkor8i24ddi1fmto6m351ammuruvknbksfjk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs)

---
Hey,

I wanted you to be the first to know:

**I have officially filed the petition to transfer my election case from Maricopa County to the State Supreme Court.
**
**[Rush a donation so we can keep pushing this case! They want us to stop but we must prove them WRONG.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqvcb9bki0vk1rf077k3m3jver05h967ldp8rio_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs)
**
The complete and utter CHAOS that was the Arizona governor election needs to be EXAMINED BY THE SUPREME COURT!

**I will not concede. Why? Because Katie Hobbs was not duly elected.
**
I believe in free and fair, honest, and transparent elections. And I will not stop fighting until we get those in Arizona. This is about making sure the voice of Arizona is heard

**_[Stop Katie Hobbs.
](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z53gbp6irdkrm6qlvq221o1aq4hfd4dqvu4j5fe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs) [Stop the corruption.
](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2bjn7pd0547444dj909ar52mtft2l6e2nbpq460_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs) [Restore America’s elections.
](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2hm81v82bkg73vq7kj8k2k6is3i38mt36sq1jkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs) [Restore our voice.
](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zguaa0sghqt8dsjfas3seodcuf55qgm4k3k5euao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs) [Donate now if you’re with me.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsoog9dcbn3nupcfur92c88rm065qg19au09v7uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cpi60or6chh2bs)
_**
I know this is an uphill battle, but I promise you it will be worth it.

God bless,

Kari Lake

| Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Multiple Republicans are already plotting a run against Sherrod in 2024.

CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230109?refcode=sbe230109]

We can’t say we’re surprised -- there are a few reasons why the GOP is targeting Sherrod so early in the cycle:
1.
Sherrod
is
one
of
only
three
Senate
Democrats
representing
states
Trump
won
in
2020.
2.
3.
He’s
also
the
last
remaining
statewide-elected
Democrat
in
Ohio.
4.
5.
Mitch
McConnell
and
Senate
Republicans
only
need
to
flip
two
seats
to
take
back
the

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: I was sworn in for my third term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
After 4 days and 15 votes to choose the Speaker of the House, we were finally sworn in! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57107010/386898590/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJlN2IzMi01ODkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ko7CCU_7-NLGLyfx0dqGhU_MTWGy1YbGN9A_YFr9Hs=&emci=d98e87bf-2b90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=1c2e7b32-5890-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
I wanted to take a moment to say thank you, Peter.

I was finally sworn in to serve my third term in the 118th Congress after it took Republicans 4 days and 15 votes to choose the Speaker of the House. It was an incredibly special day that was only made possible by the support of this grassroots team.

Whether you donated, volunteered, voted, or helped spread my message to your friends and family last year, you are the reason I am back to serve the people of Washington's 8th District. I am excited to continue working in Congress to address the issues that matter most to you.

Republicans’ inability to unite around a speaker suggests this may be a chaotic and challenging term in the House. While we may no longer hold the majority and Republicans are scrambling to figure out the direction of their party for this next session, I'm committed to doing everything in my power to pass legislation to lower costs, expand access to affordable health care, lower prescription drug costs, protect our planet, and so much more. And, of course, I look forward to partnering with the administration to bring all those infrastructure projects to fruition, and working with local groups on the community projects we secured funding for.

So Peter, thank you again for all of your support. I look forward to seeing what we accomplish together this year.

Thank you,

Kim

**[Friend, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in the next 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between me and American Bridge PAC? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57107475/386900894/-1022007294?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2171-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MjdmZGU0LTU4OTAtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=geWPai2Zu9Ga_aopH9n3NfGEDOo7dbjGiqtUJbfpAJ0=) **
**Friend, ****as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: **

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. **

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in the next 24 hours – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between me and American Bridge PAC?

---
Friend, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. **

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.
**[So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC during the next 24 hours and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57107480/386900899/-1022007294?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2171-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MjdmZGU0LTU4OTAtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=geWPai2Zu9Ga_aopH9n3NfGEDOo7dbjGiqtUJbfpAJ0=) **
Keep the faith,
Hakeem

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: breaking the GOP supermajority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
Since being elected Chairman of the House Democratic Caucus in November, I have had a few people ask me what my new role entails. Simply put, I’m responsible for ending the GOP’s supermajority in the Tennessee House. This tall task includes many different tasks and responsibilities, and I don’t take any one of them lightly.
Recently, I have been primarily focused on fundraising, and I am delighted to share that our first fundraiser last week with special guest Bakari Sellers was a tremendous success. But we still have a long way to go before we are able to fully support our Democratic candidates in 2024. Will you invest $250, $100, $50, or $25 today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023] to help us break the harmful GOP supermajority and rebuild Democratic power in the Tennessee House?
At noon tomorrow, we will no longer be able to accept contributions until the legislative session adjourns several months from now. Time is of the essence!
Tennesseans deserve better from our state government, and the House Democrats are going to fight tirelessly for our state. Our values are worth fighting for.
Gratefully,
John Ray Clemmons
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]

Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

| Team,

Today is the start of the Arizona legislature’s annual session and there is a long laundry list of things we need to work on.

Fixing our school spending limits, our water infrastructure, repealing the archaic 1800's abortion ban, and much, much more need immediate attention.

Unfortunately, Republicans still hold a one-seat margin in each legislative chamber. And while Arizona voters sent a strong message in rejecting MAGA Republicans statewide, the AZ GOP in the legislature has doubled down.

They put extremists like Wendy Rogers in leadership positions. This all but guarantees Republicans will refuse to work with Gov. Hobbs in fixing our important issues. So if they aren’t willing to work together, we’ve got to work to defeat them.

**[Team, the entire AZ legislature will be back up for grabs in 2024, and if we’re going to flip the final seats we need to have a majority, we have to work on that right now. clean_body: | | | Flipping the AZ legislature starts today | | | Team, Today is the start of the Arizona legislature’s annual session and there is a long laundry list of things we need to work on. Fixing our school spending limits, our water infrastructure, repealing the archaic 1800's abortion ban, and much, much more need immediate attention. Unfortunately, Republicans still hold a one-seat margin in each legislative chamber. And while Arizona voters sent a strong message in rejecting MAGA Republicans statewide, the AZ GOP in the legislature has doubled down. They put extremists like Wendy Rogers in leadership positions. This all but guarantees Republicans will refuse to work with Gov. Hobbs in fixing our important issues. So if they aren’t willing to work together, we’ve got to work to defeat them. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Our work continues, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Val Hoyle
subject: This is why we can't have nice things
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57107682/386902487/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTMzYzM1YS01YjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YiVB57r5zQcKQ-XTuyUAhFDP_bGrZYuQJq3fHhnlS4=&emci=68734873-5890-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3533c35a-5b90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, I'm sure you followed the chaos last week of what _should_ have been the first week of the 118th Congress. However it looked on TV, I'll tell you, it was even stranger in person. It is my greatest honor to have been sworn in to represent the people of Oregon's 4th district in Congress on January 7th... only four days after it _should_ have happened. On what should have been a day to celebrate with family, friends and the American people, the entire Congress was being held hostage by extremists in the GOP caucus and the ego of Kevin McCarthy. **All last week, chaos ensued as McCarthy showed a shameful lack of spine and lost vote after vote for Speaker.** As Democrats, we were ready to work with our Republican colleagues. However, McCarthy was willing to debase himself _14 times_ while giving away the power of the Speakership – all so he could hold the gavel and have the title of Speaker. And the concessions he made to the "sedition caucus" behind closed doors in the dead of night show we can expect him to surrender a lot more over the next two years. **During last year's campaign, Kevin McCarthy was so fixated on becoming Speaker, he spent millions of dollars on deceitful ads in Oregon to try to flip this district.** Well, Peter, McCarthy didn't get the outcome he wanted in Oregon's 4th District and I couldn't have won this race without your help and support. And if there's one take away from last week's clown show, it's that he's gonna have to cater to the most radical and unreasonable elements of his party to hold the only thing he seems to care about: his gavel. **Think about that: Even Kevin McCarthy isn't conservative enough for the extremist wing of his own party.** Keep in mind that when Democrats _had the same 4 seat majority_ , we were able to pass transformational legislation investing in fixing our crumbling infrastructure, directing significant resources to combat the climate crisis, saving our economy from collapse, getting shots in arms and so much more. The GOP can't even elect a Speaker on the first vote. Or the second. Or the third. You get the picture. **I'm here and I'm ready to get to work.** So are every single one of my colleagues on the Democratic side of the aisle. It's a shame that the Republicans in Congress don't share our commitment to a functional Congress that can address the needs of the American people. McCarthy and his pals have already planned votes this week to defund critical services, to ban abortions nationwide, and to let January 6 insurrectionists off the hook. And, Peter, I'm ready to fight back. Stay tuned, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: Our Revolution
subject: Don't miss tonight's 2023 kickoff call at 8:30pm ET/5:30 PT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Join Our Revolution's LIVE 2023 Kickoff Call
TONIGHT at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT and strategize directly with progressive
leaders for the year to come!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=3869%2E5885482%2ExlkZGQ ]Click here to RSVP now and read below to find out more about this
important first strategy call of 2023!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3869%2E5885482%2ExlkZGQ ][IMG]

New US Rep Greg Casar will talk about his first week in the House and how
the largest progressive bloc ever in Congress is strategizing for the New
Year!

We'll also hear from new St. Louis Board President Megan Green on how to
build and wield local power! Our progressive bloc passed a Guaranteed
Basic Income pilot program in St. Louis last month, and we’re organizing
to elect more mayors and council members in major cities in 2023!

And Our Revolution has with BIG news for New Year — we're launching
campaigns in states across the country to raise the minimum wage because
one job should be enough! Saru Jarayaman, President of One Fair Wage will
be with us to organize for workers and higher wages in 2023!

Then, CA Dems Progressive Caucus Chair Amar Shergill will give an update
on efforts to transform the party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3869%2E5885482%2ExlkZGQ ]Don't miss TONIGHT'S exciting first call of the year! Click here to
RSVP:

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cefa4d7080734b51afdd6f8a5006974f&_e=i0fga0YOg-8jPJXFeN1xfwFWRulus_GcNn0bHw0S-0_bAvFtbL5xCdXMzk3wl8irsfGS5iUGN_DgJ5qJS4zRzBNUmYhWqAegCgeLR4OvfK9VegiV7ZntSowPjcPGN4_pWMwXApL4Nlu1M53E0HRjonkQ7nH3Jo5gOpyHrkxebZKoatzeIiqI4OgwA3VX27q2SPuexgr8-CbTuEcohzAWBj8tA_4I5H_HaIf2nk6rsCQc2oVNj1Wub3on8_ewtCiKgxrhjKQTPopD_6-zNz2q1V-WppRJ3Z5A0JPOIWUvVlBuxfkIQDPQkmWDGpd0LPOm9oUfSkWzadr6FYEDEl8eYa_95ucmpObuJMj4OgFPytjsw8_39ht1OCoC-2IorXrwUOPDMOytHuo28e7nQNtMKg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cefa4d7080734b51afdd6f8a5006974f&_e=i0fga0YOg-8jPJXFeN1xfwFWRulus_GcNn0bHw0S-0_bAvFtbL5xCdXMzk3wl8irsfGS5iUGN_DgJ5qJS4zRzBNUmYhWqAegCgeLR4OvfK9VegiV7ZntSowPjcPGN4_pWMwXApL4Nlu1M53E0HRjonkQ7nH3Jo5gOpyHrkxebZKoatzeIiqI4OgwA3VX27q2SPuexgr8-CbTuEcohzAWBj8tA_4I5H_HaIf2nk6rsCS4kNYGtB-Bl0JmeHzGCrZFf8OqeishvZmWvGqw1USF-wINd-CMuoOlU1OMYddImuOgCTd_19zGlq3Kgr3E7oQ8F_RSol13pMK5469ZAlL0QaVBnLeMwVYMlqqprIootBKy11PjqQfr73gacPxusJINRS5V2u8AxE1OrWVQ1-cSVg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cefa4d7080734b51afdd6f8a5006974f&_e=i0fga0YOg-8jPJXFeN1xfwFWRulus_GcNn0bHw0S-0_bAvFtbL5xCdXMzk3wl8irsfGS5iUGN_DgJ5qJS4zRzBNUmYhWqAegCgeLR4OvfK9VegiV7ZntSowPjcPGN4_pWMwXApL4Nlu1M53E0HRjonkQ7nH3Jo5gOpyHrkxebZKoatzeIiqI4OgwA3VX27q2SPuexgr8-CbTuEcohzAWBj8tA_4I5H_HaIf2nk6rsCR67_duQucQ52VAwgJbh4OaC1NmkvaXuhJOaIWtQFecGd4y4L_vpfpYo5b6BMI8AKD0qvlLORkssMe3QuT7MjXgf1xbLA9y8pWcobl4mk2T9trwd3zg49rvrOJZAx1-ECYV1fI-tEebyOQA5uAS-6JomcLxDLG2feBTixZgldIxbw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Air Force Records Reveal Tens of Thousands of Taxpayer Dollars Spent to House Ashli Babbitt Shooter and His Pet for Several Months in ‘Distinguished Visitor Suite’ at Joint Base Andrews
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 31 pages of documents from the Department of the Air Force, Joint Base Andrews, MD, that show U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd was housed at taxpayer expense at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed U.S. Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt inside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 9, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61723&L=28679&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGF4cGF5ZXItZG9sbGFycy1zcGVudC10by1ob3VzZS1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LXNob290ZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=) | **[Judicial Watch: Air Force Records Reveal Tens of Thousands of Taxpayer Dollars Spent to House Ashli Babbitt Shooter and His Pet for Several Months in ‘Distinguished Visitor Suite’ at Joint Base Andrews](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61723&L=28679&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGF4cGF5ZXItZG9sbGFycy1zcGVudC10by1ob3VzZS1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LXNob290ZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)** Judicial Watch announced recently it received 31 pages of documents from the Department of the Air Force, Joint Base Andrews, MD, that show U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd was housed at taxpayer expense at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed U.S. Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt inside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61723&L=28680&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXRoZS1wYXNzaW5nLW9mLXBlYXJjZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==) | **[Judicial Watch Statement on the Passing of Russell Pearce, Patriot and Former Arizona State Senate President](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61723&L=28680&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXRoZS1wYXNzaW5nLW9mLXBlYXJjZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==)** Judicial Watch is proud to have worked with Russell Pearce. He was a hard-working, public-minded patriot who upheld the rule of law in the face of the slings and arrows of the open borders Left. As leader of the of the Arizona State Senate, Pearce was the chief sponsor of commonsense legislation that allowed law enforcement in Arizona to ask for proof of citizenship during traffic stops, as well as the “Legal Arizona Workers Act,” which required all Arizona employers to use the E-Verify system to confirm the eligibility of new employees and penalized employers who knowingly hired illegal aliens. Key parts of this legislation survived court challenges and continue to protect Arizona and all of America. | | | | | Peter, **_Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
Republicans have no one to blame but themselves for this week's humiliating display.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57109594/386910033/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230109GOP_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2QwODVkZC02NjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30F0RX2bTjPerIvcFlHqORYXFhfTZRmDVRHgBodCkeQ=)

Well, this has certainly been a historic week in the House.

Usually, though, the House makes history when it _passes legislation_ — not when it fails 14 times to elect a Speaker. And make no mistake: while Kevin McCarthy _finally_ secured the votes he needed, he's going to keep having to make concession after concession to the House Freedom Caucus in the weeks ahead. We have most certainly not seen the last of the House GOP's dysfunction and disunity.

We're witnessing Republicans reap what they've sown. They've had so many chances to rid themselves of Trumpism and election denialism — but they refused, deciding instead to lurch further right in an effort to gin up base turnout at the ballot box.

**The dangerous and unserious voices who were repeatedly given a platform for years are now demanding even more power, and the party is clueless about how to stop them.**

This week's humiliating display makes one thing clear: Republicans are in no position to responsibly govern.

The American people deserve so much better. So we need to get to work to make sure that this dangerous and incompetent Republican majority doesn't last past 2024.

clean_body: Republicans have no one to blame but themselves for this week's humiliating display. = Well, this has certainly been a historic week in the House. Usually, though, the House makes history when it passes legislation — not when it fails 14 times to elect a Speaker. And make no mistake: while Kevin McCarthy finally secured the votes he needed, he's going to keep having to make concession after concession to the House Freedom Caucus in the weeks ahead. We have most certainly not seen the last of the House GOP's dysfunction and disunity. We're witnessing Republicans reap what they've sown. They've had so many chances to rid themselves of Trumpism and election denialism — but they refused, deciding instead to lurch further right in an effort to gin up base turnout at the ballot box. The dangerous and unserious voices who were repeatedly given a platform for years are now demanding even more power, and the party is clueless about how to stop them. This week's humiliating display makes one thing clear: Republicans are in no position to responsibly govern. The American people deserve so much better. So we need to get to work to make sure that this dangerous and incompetent Republican majority doesn't last past 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team AOC
subject: Finally sworn in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria has officially started her 3rd term in Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230109-3776-header&t=1&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)
It took Republicans in the House of Representatives 4 days and 15 rounds of voting to secure 216 votes for a Speaker of the House.
Despite the chaotic delay, just before 2:00 AM on Saturday, January 7, Alexandria was finally sworn in as U.S. Representative for New York’s 14th Congressional District in the 118th Congress.
[This will be Alexandria’s 3rd term serving the constituents of NY-14, and her fifth year fighting for social, racial, and economic justice in Congress. Can you help us give her a strong start this term by chipping in $3 today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230109.Lc1wZK&refcode=em20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230109.Lc1wZK&refcode=em20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230109.Lc1wZK&refcode=em20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)**
Alexandria is working in Congress – even while in the minority party – to win Medicare for All, tax corporations and the ultra rich, dramatically increase affordable housing across the country, expand unions and worker power, and aggressively confront the climate crisis with a Green New Deal.
[If you’re able to, please chip in $3 or any amount to kick off Alexandria’s 3rd term with a strong start! Alexandria is able to challenge the influence of corporations and special interests in Congress only because of the grassroots support of everyday people like you.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230109.Lc1wZK&refcode=em20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)
We congratulate Alexandria on officially beginning her 3rd term, and look forward to sharing her updates on her work in Congress with you!
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230109?refcode=em20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3776_2526796_Co84jf&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230109-3776-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=25&akid=3776%2E2526796%2ECo84jf)**

---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01d2dba61864183b8557ea1ffb0f78a&_e=6ZCbSUzo3VphHzChP_-4Ntrsm5y-jWZFeZxbBVt1n-iu5tdSPEohcMAuSCAqo-10zudzxXVvXl4LL4MWZ-jm5j5KzX8tlQX20a4wGCn5XzzsVjBypU1IxlAbiirzGrY9HsPr0Zgxxk8R_sTB3oD3xQqVytfYQrMLToWniB2zyxfWk1OPV74aO31SZgTg_tKZz2dTT_UsnEjTbsiK0spCeIKLQoVYzds2c2FB_eK68gOTx9MlIhmZLRMKn7yXxovYkSHuINO1rZR7U8ltr5zcz4JMKqSvNMXANzxqrJZ7xJ87cMzjhtG8nZwXT_GWYxC8lRlyaJjWVRsbjryNovZSyg1RhGZdl6Nzawtb8GVSjaDyKV-rYiH1zS9th4VfFeZ04ZIqIZlNFqwwQfLp6E03Pgpr-m5JmrtPOGGpCcfTCmc4z6QPdN9_eh6wMQV6DnH0)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01d2dba61864183b8557ea1ffb0f78a&_e=6ZCbSUzo3VphHzChP_-4Ntrsm5y-jWZFeZxbBVt1n-iu5tdSPEohcMAuSCAqo-10zudzxXVvXl4LL4MWZ-jm5j5KzX8tlQX20a4wGCn5XzzsVjBypU1IxlAbiirzGrY9HsPr0Zgxxk8R_sTB3oD3xQqVytfYQrMLToWniB2zyxfWk1OPV74aO31SZgTg_tKZz2dTT_UsnEjTbsiK0spCeIKLQoVYzds2c2FB_eK68gOTx9MlIhmZLRMKn7yXxovYkSHuINO1rZR7U8ltr5zczxHuEdmgGYGQZDlyZ5cDwRLQUpI_LXWJSiW8_RYWh8o2U1t1-gUiide-6LfGGeFbBwkT_1LGXDgIUMnr-jsL1DCOZkJ8NI4YCBcX8Bwy2E1Dr3D47N8_jBSPVZBVWmOx_kK4EtqPKl-bG-z2vTvDL03h69otwVP4xG7_b25N2n6t)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01d2dba61864183b8557ea1ffb0f78a&_e=6ZCbSUzo3VphHzChP_-4Ntrsm5y-jWZFeZxbBVt1n-iu5tdSPEohcMAuSCAqo-10zudzxXVvXl4LL4MWZ-jm5j5KzX8tlQX20a4wGCn5XzzsVjBypU1IxlAbiirzGrY9HsPr0Zgxxk8R_sTB3oD3xQqVytfYQrMLToWniB2zyxfWk1OPV74aO31SZgTg_tKZz2dTT_UsnEjTbsiK0spCeIKLQoVYzds2c2FB_eK68gOTx9MlIhmZLRMKn7yXxovYkSHuINO1rZR7U8ltr5zcz7D_wxpbuJ-3d5Lu4bGGDOKjwAPXGgPoAj_p7nvYMAlrUO7EyqoV43ZS0O4zaEO0PnbF98k0Q7U3S6jFUvMYA2bVXxICpzILAiG_-yymEdxfpwF1Z63aJq9DJ0mwT7lBOxQIwK6k2fXrdNefhRvbr52xRMct7pnBDtT_ZYV5UQc0)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01d2dba61864183b8557ea1ffb0f78a&_e=6ZCbSUzo3VphHzChP_-4Ntrsm5y-jWZFeZxbBVt1n-iu5tdSPEohcMAuSCAqo-10zudzxXVvXl4LL4MWZ-jm5j5KzX8tlQX20a4wGCn5XzzsVjBypU1IxlAbiirzGrY9HsPr0Zgxxk8R_sTB3oD3xQqVytfYQrMLToWniB2zyxfWk1OPV74aO31SZgTg_tKZz2dTT_UsnEjTbsiK0spCeIKLQoVYzds2c2FB_eK68gOTx9MlIhmZLRMKn7yXxovYkSHuINO1rZR7U8ltr5zcz6WjOI-3WTbcKmSzJSARyoNZgQ4DSkLT3AcP1DrAX892TOvvOicRHK6XIxbogHG_QR_SNAd9-hMKXT3FKdflDZn8lIehLWCRVMLPaKFQS0mZX_ekRP4t62JIXwj8akX7qWKIPRC1BUFNaa8SAcEdjAJckk4pcTqTkWrGeYjAUWNk).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
