name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A message for Summer & Greg >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

On Saturday, Justice Democrats Summer Lee and Greg Casar were officially
sworn in to Congress — and we want to celebrate them!

While the Republicans descended into chaos, Greg and Summer remained
crystal clear on their commitment to repping our movement in Congress.

Summer is officially the first Black woman to ever represent Pennsylvania
in the House, and Greg Casar enters Congress as the new Whip of the
Progressive Caucus.

Their campaigns have been working tirelessly for two years to pull off
these victories, and we want to send them to Congress with the warmest
welcome possible. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/congratulate-jd-congress?source=em20230109-26977&t=1002&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ]Will you sign our card below and personally
congratulate the two newest Justice Democrats in Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/congratulate-jd-congress?source=em20230109-26977&t=1003&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/congratulate-jd-congress?source=em20230109-26977&t=1004&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ]→ Sign the Card

Summer’s campaign in Pennsylvania and Greg’s in Texas are proof of what we
can achieve when we build strong multi-racial, multi-generational,
people-powered movements for change. They went all in to bring those
movements to Congress and showed the country that our fight is worth it.

Now, as the newest Justice Democrats in Congress, they will continue to
fight for the transformational change we need.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/congratulate-jd-congress?source=em20230109-26977&t=1005&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ]Will you join us as we celebrate Greg & Summer and leave a personal
message of congratulations on our virtual card?

Thanks!

— Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230109-26977-footer&t=1008&refcode2=26977_1203867_omMBwT&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=26977%2E1203867%2EomMBwT

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. clean_body: The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: I know what I believe in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter,

From the moment I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have
never wavered in my belief in our grassroots movement. And I know what
else I believe in: outsized spending and dark money should not buy our
elections.

I don’t believe that our politics and policies should be bought, so I
won’t be either. I have never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs
or dark money groups, and I never will. And I know that it only makes our
movement stronger, because people power wins.

Just look at the incredible cohort of progressives I was proud to endorse
this cycle — Greg Casar, Summer Lee, Delia Ramirez, and many more — who
have joined me in the ranks of the Progressive Caucus as we fight every
day on your behalf.

I say this because I want to remind you that what we do now matters. Our
new session of Congress has officially begun — with Republican control of
the House, but also with more progressives than ever before.

In this new year, my team is taking stock of our resources and setting our
goals for the upcoming cycle as we plan for the road ahead. And
unfortunately, though our work remains as urgent as ever, our fundraising
has been steadily declining.

I’m writing to you now because I wanted to personally ask if you can make
a donation to my campaign today and set us up for success no matter the
challenges ahead.

I am not here to guilt trip you. There is no imaginary donor who will
triple match your donation, and the sky is not falling. Just you and me,
and my sincere hope that you will recognize the importance of this moment.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25531?refcode=em20230109-2038&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=2038%2E420207%2E5ifrRR ]If you are in a position to make a contribution today, I would
appreciate it greatly. Please know that your support always makes a
difference for us.

At the end of the day, every election I’ve won, every fundraising goal
I’ve hit, every milestone I’ve worked with our Progressive Caucus to
achieve — it all comes down to you.

Thank you for your steadfast support.

Pramila

(Sent from my iPhone)

clean_body: Peter, From the moment I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have never wavered in my belief in our grassroots movement. And I know what else I believe in: outsized spending and dark money should not buy our elections. I don’t believe that our politics and policies should be bought, so I won’t be either. I have never accepted a single cent from corporate PACs or dark money groups, and I never will. And I know that it only makes our movement stronger, because people power wins. Just look at the incredible cohort of progressives I was proud to endorse this cycle — Greg Casar, Summer Lee, Delia Ramirez, and many more — who have joined me in the ranks of the Progressive Caucus as we fight every day on your behalf. I say this because I want to remind you that what we do now matters. Our new session of Congress has officially begun — with Republican control of the House, but also with more progressives than ever before. In this new year, my team is taking stock of our resources and setting our goals for the upcoming cycle as we plan for the road ahead. And unfortunately, though our work remains as urgent as ever, our fundraising has been steadily declining. I’m writing to you now because I wanted to personally ask if you can make a donation to my campaign today and set us up for success no matter the challenges ahead. I am not here to guilt trip you. There is no imaginary donor who will triple match your donation, and the sky is not falling. Just you and me, and my sincere hope that you will recognize the importance of this moment. [ ]If you are in a position to make a contribution today, I would appreciate it greatly. Please know that your support always makes a difference for us. At the end of the day, every election I’ve won, every fundraising goal I’ve hit, every milestone I’ve worked with our Progressive Caucus to achieve — it all comes down to you. Thank you for your steadfast support. Pramila (Sent from my iPhone) Contribute to Pramila Jayapal:

| | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

Remember when the Left passed $80 billion in funding to help the IRS add tens of thousands of new employees? ** ****Tonight, House Republicans are voting on a bill to repeal that funding.****
[Do you think Republicans should take back the IRS’s $80 billion handout? Take the poll today.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=88d3885239d84986a8ce7ffb211bccbb&_e=llawJkmEaaQ_THWkgNXfjW8i5-dIRsP6CyfFpYWsVxWDLq0y1gyDxg63B60q9EgtN4f-LW9tq9GgG5Xs1iKDEXjutNR3VMzXBVH81tfhFYJVCdvKWykQTHmBE3mLaYwvIFbK2zvSvLE5ayvb-n_3KesDOwvGXyswVlXFU3jERpuPNaSgtF_UuRwSaXF1mbLnV7mErCiQg-JEDnfHay0qRXoJLyd3pvqnI4CDkUlNFTcZrDZCvLBFStYxxpdS4y_PZQFvp_AYa6BT6BUOoh-cNvC-DLPgX_t12WsYfqEYN_2JpHvSa93fEtMKFD_TAge8mmbveOddiL2A86ph9b-_-8gqAnVRGIYlRo_hn2fwX_Y%3D)**

The Left would like you to think that tens of thousands of new IRS employees is a good thing. _But, do you know who the supersized IRS is likely to go after?_**Working-class and middle-class families.** How do we know? Just look at who the IRS targeted last year. The Americans who made the least were FIVE TIMES more likely to be audited than those who made the most. Now that Republicans have the House majority, they’re working to undo the Left’s destruction and prevent the IRS from crushing hard-working families and small businesses. The American people elected Republicans to fix problems. Republicans are keeping their word and fighting for the American people by repealing this funding. Let me know what you think. **[Take the poll to let me know if you think Republicans should repeal this funding and stop a flood of new IRS employees.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=88d3885239d84986a8ce7ffb211bccbb&_e=llawJkmEaaQ_THWkgNXfjW8i5-dIRsP6CyfFpYWsVxWDLq0y1gyDxg63B60q9EgtN4f-LW9tq9GgG5Xs1iKDEXjutNR3VMzXBVH81tfhFYJVCdvKWykQTHmBE3mLaYwvIFbK2zvSvLE5ayvb-n_3KesDOwvGXyswVlXFU3jERpuPNaSgtF_UuRwSaXF1mbLnV7mErCiQg-JEDnfHay0qRVjRWWtq6siu3GX6RBYVMWyWggenh6oxMfa4aaGIndbVDLdMskIG68AVxt56xIcIPTbUUVTPk8FwsWDG3GGWsX_N4tIIw7AqO9QZ5RR75lijfYxk6h_SktG7Tg-NDsXIU24kBw2WTqJ03E-WxLcggOo%3D) ** My very best,

clean_body: | | | Friend, Remember when the Left passed $80 billion in funding to help the IRS add tens of thousands of new employees? Tonight, House Republicans are voting on a bill to repeal that funding. The Left would like you to think that tens of thousands of new IRS employees is a good thing. But, do you know who the supersized IRS is likely to go after?Working-class and middle-class families. How do we know? Just look at who the IRS targeted last year. The Americans who made the least were FIVE TIMES more likely to be audited than those who made the most. Now that Republicans have the House majority, they’re working to undo the Left’s destruction and prevent the IRS from crushing hard-working families and small businesses. The American people elected Republicans to fix problems. Republicans are keeping their word and fighting for the American people by repealing this funding. Let me know what you think. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. Peter, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. _For every American._ These Warriors put on their uniforms every day – and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. **And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. **
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e4df8a6b325e46e1874fbf51253b4478&_e=-Moh3Ba0gH4Kowzy5jw4Im3QROvGdSGbqAwmxAqDgCyKxxXU8nTaCR0qmnSETpiD62bpMrkld4wP_gOs8VFy708vzUpf0Oh_GMQd_p99_J5Cbuk2k8kO7nlOyUg5-hN8laH_bTRIe-_1IUqFi4nIGoWm-biyepTA4_qWo8fNWB-WMp2mZUZfF9y7rYLmdiR-L8M-0IYgiPcuIoVK4Ti3f19CUEBO3E9btZJH6cggpv5tYC6fGZ-RAwsP-kqfh7iln4pMNOhk4Qwk9UHPpvB0otVca3HNUmJSDDYA7LEcOKLg9WdSYi3AxVCs0rrrtoYnZ7rvHU4FUNGSln6SMyBaMJnCYd24tBszkhWk3RcWwIEcB8e901mlVVAVe4G1xPhtYRvJVH_tUd8_IiYjoAfTcT5FYAtXOktJSczyppHRRepQllckfPI4hd_z0ihCcmPTJJYix8q5iuX9ze9nqfE1DA%3D%3D)

What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars.
---
[**GET JUSTICE FOR THE MARSOC 3**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e4df8a6b325e46e1874fbf51253b4478&_e=-Moh3Ba0gH4Kowzy5jw4Im3QROvGdSGbqAwmxAqDgCyKxxXU8nTaCR0qmnSETpiD62bpMrkld4wP_gOs8VFy708vzUpf0Oh_GMQd_p99_J5Cbuk2k8kO7nlOyUg5-hN8laH_bTRIe-_1IUqFi4nIGoWm-biyepTA4_qWo8fNWB-WMp2mZUZfF9y7rYLmdiR-L8M-0IYgiPcuIoVK4Ti3f19CUEBO3E9btZJH6cggpv5tYC6fGZ-RAwsP-kqfh7iln4pMNOhk4Qwk9UHPpvB0otVca3HNUmJSDDYA7LEcOKLjzquFQN6mswL-1yZw1Pxkvfk-gWBWsfP9AdmAq9Bbx3VmJyuCxPKM4BIzIdM2phSStwzbpTsLb5hjPUkaO6goWl_uozzP1wPWQx50u6YSrDYS11wlQ4NBDHgwRTysOt0_LBMmHB7mgusNYMprWQJQ7qlC0VeRMNpnwV9yhHViTw%3D%3D)

It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen.
**The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics.** [_**FIGHT FOR JUSTICE >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e4df8a6b325e46e1874fbf51253b4478&_e=-Moh3Ba0gH4Kowzy5jw4Im3QROvGdSGbqAwmxAqDgCyKxxXU8nTaCR0qmnSETpiD62bpMrkld4wP_gOs8VFy708vzUpf0Oh_GMQd_p99_J5Cbuk2k8kO7nlOyUg5-hN8laH_bTRIe-_1IUqFi4nIGoWm-biyepTA4_qWo8fNWB-WMp2mZUZfF9y7rYLmdiR-L8M-0IYgiPcuIoVK4Ti3f19CUEBO3E9btZJH6cggpv5tYC6fGZ-RAwsP-kqfh7iln4pMNOhk4Qwk9UHPpvB0otVca3HNUmJSDDYA7LEcOKJfgIxSS32fgG2kSWr735Krde-GRwb8e5JOVJwnERL996PI6FLbrh9md20GxevhPk1ZJm1GeH4GT7WtIWXFUpoDEp5gOHGLtXautOAAxTGXQtZKU0-q2CbD8IaVYwKB7O4g4iKfQecFHVcuRTP5uGmOJpWRVE1hJl7kF5yQZp7bew%3D%3D)

clean_body: We owe it to them to fight for their freedom.| | | Peter, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. For every American. These Warriors put on their uniforms every day – and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. And they’re facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars. It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines – the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor – just once – and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we’re approaching a critical milestone. After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, aJanuary 17thtrial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron. This is where you come in, Peter. We’re counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial. Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it’s CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. Thank you for your help. Semper Fi’ David “Bull” Gurfein LtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: WA Leg is now in session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
How to contact your legislators and tell them how to vote | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1d224ea137&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**The Washington State Legislature is now in session!** This year is important to the future of our state - with a long session (105 days), our Republican leaders will have many tough fights on their hands as the reckless Democrats push for an even greater expansion of their power. Democrats have shown no ability to provide systematic solutions for the thousands of hard-working citizens who can no longer afford the cost of living, nor have they found solutions for the families broken by the culture of drugs and crime that Democrats have allowed to ravage our communities. _Our State and Republican leaders in Olympia need your help!_

**We have created a one-stop site called ‘Olympia Watch’ to keep you updated** with links to direct you to more information on bills filed and their current status in the legislature, links to find your district’s legislators so you can contact them, and information on how to testify during the legislative session.

On this site you will also see a link to ‘**Influencing Olympia Effectively’** , they provide a simple and free-of-charge online class that will help you build the skills needed to effectively make a difference as a citizen involved in the lawmaking process.

---
| [Olympia Watch](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fe492c833c&e=6a281f566d "Olympia Watch")
---
| **Republicans are pushing for common-sense approaches to restoring affordability, restoring****public safety, and passing accountability measures to move our state in the right direction.**

We will need your help spreading the word to help STOP the disastrous bills coming from Washington Democrats this year. Right now, there are 246 pre-filed bills for this years' session - they tell a story of Democrats continuing to make Washington State more un-affordable, working against public safety, and restricting your rights as citizens of this great state.
---
| [Olympia Watch](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5141b141fc&e=6a281f566d "Olympia Watch")
---
| A sneak peak at just a few of the bad bills Democrats are pushing early in this years' long session:

**Affordability**
* [HB 2026 (2021-22)](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ee457d4a19&e=6a281f566d) \- Adding a per-mile tax to Washington Drivers
* Despite yet another budget surplus and a weak economy, Democrats are seeking ways to take more of your hard-earned money and will likely introduce a bill proposing a 2.5 cent tax on every mile you drive in the state as recommended by their Transportation Commission.

**Public Safety**
* [HB 1025](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ab3cd1a9c6&e=6a281f566d) \- Eliminating Qualified Immunity
* Qualified immunity protects our officers from liability for civil damages as long as their conduct does not egregiously violate constitutional rights. Elimation of qualified immunity would serve to further erode public safety in our state and could lead to other undesirable outcomes.

**Gun Rights**
* [HB 1143](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4e6a968be3&e=6a281f566d) \- Requiring Permits to purchase firearms, including fingerprints and a medical history waiver
* [SB 5078](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=add719b4e3&e=6a281f566d) \- Allow for legal action against gun manufacturers and dealers for the actions of criminals.
* [SB 5193](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=15d3293ef8&e=6a281f566d) \- "Assault Weapons" Ban

It is imperative that we STOP these bad bills in their tracks. We need your help in getting the word out to friends, family, and neighbors on these bad bills and establishing a 'watch' over Olympia.

Visit [**Olympia Watch**](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6a9a672261&e=6a281f566d) on the WSRP website to learn more as the session goes on.

Thank you,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party

---
| [Become a Sustaining Donor](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b7c03d93dd&e=6a281f566d "Become a Sustaining Donor")
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/wa-leg-2023?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

**Our mailing address is:**
Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005
[Add us to your address book](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=829b5dc015) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=829b5dc015).

---
|
---
| Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1st St, Bellevue, WA 98005.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.wsrp.org](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2e330c9f39&e=6a281f566d)
---

name: Hala Ayala
subject: Tomorrow, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for State Senate
body:
There's a critical special election opportunity for Democrats to gain a Senate seat!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111633/386917797/-1029427386?refcode=EM_FR_230109AR_HA_FULL_6_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWI3ZTNiOC03MjkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vACyUJPATz-_hwjh4zh4JE0g_MykM5hn2JtBymoR6xA=) Peter, did you know there's a special election tomorrow in Virginia?

It's true — and it's in the very definition of a swing district! **Virginia's 7th District is open, and Democrat Aaron Rouse has a great chance to win it,_gain_ a seat, and strengthen our firewall in the State Senate against Glenn Youngkin's extreme agenda.**

[**We need to fight hard for every district — and this is too big an opportunity to pass up. Will you split $10 right now to help Aaron reach 50 donations before the polls close tomorrow? name: Susan Wild
subject: Republican chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Republicans were too distracted by their own infighting to elect a Speaker of the House – and that meant the rest of us couldn’t conduct any official business.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57111679/386917934/-59299736?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230109-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQ0NTkyOC03MzkwLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGJh9PNb-DmpkJfwiwTzmeh434kLNb_5UiFYwE6gJXY=)
---
| Peter,

I had planned to send you an email last Tuesday – six whole days ago – that started with this: _“Today is the official first day of the 118th Congress. It is the honor of my lifetime to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th district and I am so excited to be back to continue fighting for the issues that matter most.”_ But Republicans were too distracted by their own infighting to elect a Speaker of the House – and that meant the rest of us couldn’t conduct any official business. **Their dysfunction was beyond frustrating to witness firsthand, and frankly, I’m concerned about what it means for the next two years of a Republican-majority Congress.**

Now we are finally able to get to work. I am determined to continue advocating for the issues that matter most to families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country – fighting inflation, lowering health care costs, creating more good-paying jobs, and more. **But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

---
Peter,

U.S. Border Patrol recorded over **2 MILLION illegal immigrant encounters at our Southern Border in 2022.**

This cannot continue in 2023.****ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.** **
